programme.sub-title: Canadian Grand Prix Sprint Qualifying Highlights 2026
programme.desc: Action from the battle for sprint race positions in the fifth round of the season, held at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve in Montreal

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Eddie appears depressed, so Martin enlists the aid of a dog psychiatrist to determine the root of his misery, much to Frasier and Niles's amusement. However, the diagnosis is that Eddie is picking up negative vibes from everyone around him, causing the Cranes and Daphne to assess their own lives. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A spontaneous gesture lands the Crane brothers a double date with two beautiful women, and Frasier tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he is betraying Maris when they all take a trip to a cabin in the country. Comedy, guest starring Megan Mullally (Will & Grace) and Lisa Darr (Ellen), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles throws a house-warming party - but his new pet cockatoo threatens to spoil the festivities by clinging firmly to the top of his head and refusing to be dislodged. Comedy, guest starring Patricia Wettig (Brothers & Sisters), with David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins spying on the neighbours through Lisa's telescope while recovering from an injury, and is alarmed to see something that convinces him Ned Flanders has murdered his wife

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge buy a self-help video to improve their lives - but make the mistake of enlisting Bart and Lisa's assistance. Featuring the voices of James Brown and Albert Brooks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Nasa decides to send an average American into space as a publicity stunt - but the chances of success are jeopardised when Homer is selected for the honour. Featuring the guest voices of Buzz Aldrin and James Taylor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob is pardoned for his crimes and decides to run for political office - but still displays a few distinctly criminal tendencies. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and Larry King

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This week's competition kicks off at Rosaire Guest House in Llandudno, where host Jo and her mum Pat are going for a home-from-home vibe

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Liam host the second visit of the week at The Queens Hotel in Harlech. Professional impersonator Liam is hoping to impress with his impersonations but an issue in the bathroom gives Pat a sinking feeling

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three is to The Mill at Glynhir in Llandybie, Carmarthenshire. Mat and Helen are hoping their renovated mill will fit the bill. At first, their guests struggle to find fault - until Pat discovers that standards in the bathroom may have slipped. Things get prickly during a visit to a botanical garden in the afternoon but it's at feedback time that the hosts have the biggest thorn in their sides

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to Hideaway Escapes in Pembrokeshire, where sisters Lesley and Sarah are looking to inject a bit of colour into everyone's lives. The idea of getting back to nature bugs half of the B&Bers - and things get spicy when one set of guests refuse their room and take refuge in the car instead, leaving Lesley and Sarah all revved up come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With facility failings, bathroom blues and even one set of B&Bers refusing to even try out one of their rivals' rooms all on the agenda, Payment Day is set to be a feisty occasion. It remains to be seen who will emerge victorious when the dust settles

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks his barbecue breakfast, which takes a much-loved classic to smoky heights, then serves up his smoke-kissed sesame chicken burger, accompanied by crunchy slaw and Korean-inspired sauce. His veggie barbecue platter offers the perfect spread, comprising smoky baba ghanoush, dressed roasted peppers, minty courgettes and halloumi cheese with apricots, then finishes off with his surf 'n' turf mixed grill, cooked on a plancha griddle with butter and wine

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem (2023)
programme.desc: Turtle brothers Donatello, Leonardo, Michelangelo and Raphael have been raised in the sewers of New York by their mentor Splinter. The wise rat has sheltered his four wards from the cruelty of the human world but the brothers yearn to be accepted as normal teenagers by New Yorkers. They hope to win human hearts by performing selfless, heroic deeds with the help of their new friend April O'Neil. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Nicolas Cantu and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: The steam engine Tornado travels from the remote Levisham station to the market town of Pickering. With the season in full swing, disaster strikes as a giant wildfire jeopardises the steam train services. Volunteers work tirelessly to keep the stations spick and span, and guide dog puppies gaining their first experience of trains

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: In the Bradshaw Mountains in Arizona, USA, hidden down an 11-kilometre dirt road, is a luxury hotel built around a geothermal wonder. At The Bus Stop in Scotland, there are nine luxury buses for hire, while a secret retreat in Poland has been designed to look like an open chest of drawers. Plus, a one-of-a-kind glamping pod in eastern England, and a boutique bolthole inside an ex-windmill in Suffolk

programme.title: The Equalizer 3 (2023)
programme.desc: Former government assassin Robert McCall has found relief from past sins by doling out rough justice on behalf of the weak, vulnerable and oppressed. During a retreat in southern Italy, McCall is recuperating from a life-threatening injury, and seeks vengeance when his new friends are targeted by local crime bosses. Thriller, starring Denzel Washington and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

They start out in Mexico, where they grapple with one of the country's most famous sports - lucha libre wrestling. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes are still in Mexico and still on the side of a mountain. Once recovered, the father and son head toward Mexico's coast, where Barney takes his dad inside a pitch-black cave that's home to snakes and thousands of bats. They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.title: The Waterboy (1998)
programme.desc: An American football team's waterboy puts up with constant ridicule from the players. But one day his anger gets the better of him and he demonstrates an unexpected talent for tackling - so the coach gives him a chance to prove his worth on the pitch. However, he has to keep his blossoming sporting career a secret from his overprotective mother. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Kathy Bates, Henry Winkler and Fairuza Balk

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Extended version of the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr. With guests David Hasselhoff, Rachel Riley, Rob Beckett and Justin Moorhouse

programme.title: Police Squad!
programme.desc: Dauntless detective Frank Drebin struggles to identify background noise on a ransom tape in the hope of locating an abducted heiress. Leslie Nielsen stars as the bumbling cop

programme.title: Police Squad!

programme.desc: The Glaswegian comedian returns to his home town as part of his 2012 tour, performing to a sell-out crowd at the SECC Arena with his usual blend of social commentary, astute observations and sharp one-liners

programme.title: Modern Horror Stories
programme.desc: Sketch series highlighting the worst and scariest aspects of the modern world, showing what might happen to the Tinder generation in old age

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: After threatening to resign, Tony is offered his own independent infrastructure board, however Jim clearly has his own ideas about the word independent

programme.title: Utopia

programme.desc: The actor and his son hit the road together again, but this time they are staying closer to home and heading for Europe as they travel from Essex to Italy's Amalfi coast. programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney continue their European adventure in Germany. The boys also make a stop at a bratwurst-themed hotel and soak up some local Bavarian culture when they have a go at finger wrestling. The pair finish off their time in Germany with a wet and wild adventure in the mountains

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting R&B star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horner's mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian introduces another evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal. He is joined on stage by fellow funnyman Josh Widdicombe, and introduces an acrobatic performance by Canadian duo Chilly and Fly. Bryan Adams and Jess Glynne provide the night's musical diversions, and singer Ronan Keating risks his personal and professional relationships when he hands Michael his mobile phone in Celebrity Sent To All. Plus, a locksmith who thinks he has come to fix a faulty lock at the theatre receives the surprise of his life in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This time he invites music industry veteran Rod Stewart and pop-rock singer James Morrison to perform, along with Extreme Flamenco fusion dancers, Los Vivancos, and comedian Romesh Ranganathan. The host also hijacks Dragons' Den star Peter Jones' mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire off an embarrassing message to all the contacts in Jones' directory, and makes dreams come true for an unsuspecting electrician in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, he is joined on stage by fellow stand-up Rob Beckett, and introduces an acrobatic dance performance by Romeo of the Cirque du Soleil. He also invites electro-pop trio Years and Years to play for the assembled live audience, and a handyman receives the surprise of his life when he becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show. Plus, Michael hijacks Strictly Come Dancing judge Bruno Tonioli's mobile phone, composing another embarrassing message to deliver to his contacts in Celebrity Send To All

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts his penultimate evening of entertainment, recorded in front of a live audience at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. This week, Michael introduces a music by Katherine Jenkins, who sings Heroes, and a performance by Scottish stage mentalist Colin Cloud. Former footballer Robbie Savage hands over his mobile phone for Celebrity Send To All, and an unsuspecting florist is given her moment in the spotlight in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian's family entertainment series returns, as Michael invites more stars to perform in front of a live audience at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. For this first edition, chart-topping, Grammy-nominated singer Ellie Goulding performs, and the cast of Andrew Lloyd Webber's new West End production School of Rock also take to the stage. An unsuspecting member of the public is dragged into the limelight when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show, and Michael gets up to more mischief when Olly Murs hands over his smartphone in Celebrity Send to All

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts another Saturday night revue at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. An audience member approaching her 80th birthday receives the shock of her life when she plays Soap or Nope, and Pointless host Alexander Armstrong risks handing over his phone to Michael in Celebrity Send to All. Plus, the host goes undercover as he plots to spring a surprise on the youngest Unexpected Star yet

programme.desc: Part one of two. Mitch and Cam prepare to walk down the aisle, but are faced with a host of hitches before they tie the knot. Pepper is forced to bring the ceremony forward by four hours because of a spreading wildfire, while one of the grooms' tuxedos has been left at the dry cleaners

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Mitch and Cam's big day beset by one disaster after another, Pepper is forced to find a new venue - only for the couple to be forced out once again. Their only option is to hold the ceremony at home - but then Sal, who supposed to be marrying them, is forced to leave. Will they ever get to say 'I do'? Elizabeth Banks guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning comedy returns - as do Cameron and Mitchell, who are back from honeymoon and determined to keep the romance alive. Cameron, however, takes it just a little step too far. The Dunphys, meanwhile, have been enjoying a relaxing summer without smart-alec Alex, who is away on a trip - although she threatens to rock the boat after arriving home early - and Gloria shows a different side after arguing with Jay about the lack of effort he puts into his appearance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: With changes afoot at Springfield's airport, Bart persuades Krusty to run for Congress so he can redirect the flight path of planes passing over the Simpson home. However, he soon alters his policies once elected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: 'Scuse Me While I Miss the Sky
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge writes a novel and succeeds in getting it published to critical acclaim in the Springfield community. Homer is delighted - until he finds out its plot, which portrays him as an uncaring husband. With the guest voices of authors Tom Clancy and Thomas Pynchon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wonders when Maggie will say her first word, which prompts Marge to reminisce about Lisa's early days and how a two-year-old Bart suffered a serious outbreak of sibling jealousy. Featuring the guest voice of Elizabeth Taylor

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy, Made in Chelsea, Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen and a BBC Breakfast report on the then recently appointed Pope Leo XIV. From May 2025

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Single mum Tracy from Bedfordshire has been out of the dating game since she split with her fiancee three years ago and hopes to find a man who matches her adventurous side, while London sales adviser Matthew, 24, is tired of dating apps and thinks online profiles mean girls never actually see the real him. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. Meanwhile, chaos ensues at the precinct after a computer virus publishes everyone's internet browser history

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia

programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marge's favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Ratings for Krusty's TV show start to fall, so executives bring in co-star Princess Penelope (voiced by Anne Hathaway) to increase its appeal, and romance soon blossoms between the clown and his new sidekick. Elsewhere, Mr Burns cuts costs at the nuclear plant by taking away the staff's free doughnuts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wins $1million on the lottery, but keeps it a secret from his family, fearing Marge's reaction if she finds out about it. He and Bart set about spending the money, and buy front-row tickets to a Coldplay concert. With the guest voice of Chris Martin

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.desc: Uzzie helps to cover up Harry's catchphrase inking, Pash fixes up Daniel's unflattering tattoo, and Sketch creates an original tattoo for conspiracy theorist Dave

programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? The twins hope to hit the right note by finding musicians Lee Roy and Lisa's next property. But before they can do that, they must orchestrate a renovation that will turn their home into a number one hit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby enthusiast Andy and dental nurse Holly kick off the competition in Yorkshire with a Mexican fiesta - a fun-filled evening, but with a few blunders in the kitchen. Day two sees married couple Mitesh and Jess cooking up an Indian-inspired meal, but with a couple of spice-fearing guests, they have a tough crowd to please. Finally, it's the turn of Yorkshire couple Paul and Mandy to host with some 'proper grub'. After two nights of Paul larking around he has a few surprises in and out of the kitchen to try to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Stoke, Robbie Williams superfan Trish and her husband Dave, go all out for a good old knees up. On day two, quirky young lovebirds Patrick and Lizzie host their first ever dinner party with an 'eclectic' menu. They gamble on some wartime food and beginner's luck, and things get emotional when there's praise at the table. Finally, seasoned hosts John and Lynne have a more traditional dinner party vibe on their night

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Gloucester forklift truck driver Josh is given £12,000 to provide his trainee nurse fiancee Stacie with her dream wedding, and plans to incorporate elements of their Irish and Jamaican heritages into the big day. However, the bride has her heart set on a traditional English ceremony, and the groom's good intentions threaten to be eclipsed by bad decisions

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 23-year-old car sprayer gets the chance to give his teaching-assistant fiancee the wedding of her dreams, but is tempted to steal elements of his future sister-in-law's already-planned ceremony. As the big day approaches, the groom's organisation of the event is complicated by his desire to please his Indian mother and Scottish father

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chicago-based hardware retailer True Value's CEO and president John Hartmann poses as a handyman taking part in a reality show to go incognito among his own workforce to see how he can extend the company's lifespan and improve the experiences of both customers and employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bill Peduto, 60th Mayor of Pittsburgh, who comes from a proud family of Pennsylvania steel workers, goes incognito among his own workforce posing as a reality show contestant from Kentucky. In the 10 months since he was elected, many changes have been made in Pittsburgh and Bill wants to make sure they are effective and to hear directly from the city's employees

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

Finishing off the week are smallholders Mandy and Jim, who serve up a Filipino roast pig dish followed by baked Alaska

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A groom-to-be from London is given £12,000 to arrange every detail of his civil partnership ceremony, but questions arise over whether his cabaret theme might prove too much for his unwitting partner. Meanwhile, the best man's antics threaten to derail the plans

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A Newquay surfer is given £12,000 to plan his nuptials and give his partner of four years the wedding of her dreams. However, his beach-based ideas threaten to derail the big day, and nine enthusiastic bridesmaids look set to dominate the proceedings

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bedfordshire man James is given the funds to provide his fiancee Mercy with her dream wedding, and plans to incorporate her Nigerian heritage into the ceremony. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan from Kidderminster, Worcestershire, arranges a farm-themed wedding for his fiancee Nicky, but quickly ends up out of his depth as he tries to navigate the complex worlds of bridal dresses and women's lingerie. Fortunately, he finds himself on more familiar ground as he prepares to build his ideal reception venue

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: After 11 months together 28-year-old trainee social worker Hywel proposed spontaneously to girlfriend Beca at a Blur gig. Now he intends to create a music festival-themed wedding for his fiancee in Bridgend, south Wales. However, the grim weather seems set to to ruin their big day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, as Sean Lock and Harry Hill take on Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones. Mr Swallow, aka Nick Mohammed, is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Single mum Tracy from Bedfordshire has been out of the dating game since she split with her fiancee three years ago and hopes to find a man who matches her adventurous side, while London sales adviser Matthew, 24, is tired of dating apps and thinks online profiles mean girls never actually see the real him. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dating guru Anna Williamson visits Coleen Nolan at her day job in the Loose Women studios, before sending her on a date with a joker. Lucinda Light goes axe throwing on her second date with bearded Damian. There are bound to be splinters

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfield's male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Dracula, the Wolf Man, the Mummy and Frankenstein's monster gatecrash a Halloween party at 742 Evergreen Terrace. Bart and Lisa plot revenge on their teachers in a Hitchcock-inspired short story, but end up turning on each another

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam takes Beverly to her high-school reunion, he tries to prevent a reality where she winds up with the wrong man

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy, focusing on an 11-year-old boy as he captures his family on video camera during the 1980s. Barry wants to start driving on his 16th birthday, but Beverly advises against it and refuses to allow Pops to sell him his old car. Starring Jeff Garlin, Troy Gentile and Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fun-loving groom-to-be Liam wants a wedding day that really celebrates his native Isle of Wight, but his future wife Kandi is hoping for a more conventional day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is suspicious when Grandpa Dunphy pays a surprise visit, while Cameron tries to find his inner drummer when he joins Dylan's band. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria regret taking Manny to see a horror film. Comedy, guest starring Fred Willard

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed O'Neill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam's older sister is in town but he is scared to share his engagement news with her because she is a sad, lonely singleton. Or so he thinks. Phil and Claire feel guilty when they make a joint decision to skip Luke's volleyball game and Jay tells Gloria she needs reading glasses - but she's not having any of it. The 100th episode of the family sitcom, starring Eric Stonetreet, Ty Burrell, Julie Bowen and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dinner reservations have been secured at a plush restaurant, but Gloria is taking forever to get ready and an almighty sartorial crisis strikes when Mitch and Cam don the exact same outfit. Meanwhile, the Dunphys can't decide whether Luke is trustworthy enough to be left home alone. Starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart has his ear pierced, while Homer is fired from the nuclear power plant and finds a new job - as the captain of a submarine in the US Navy. Featuring the guest voices of Rod Steiger and Bob Denver

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tax audit leads Homer into big trouble, leaving him with no choice but to make amends by helping the government nail Mr Burns for the theft of a trillion-dollar banknote

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Ratings for Krusty's TV show start to fall, so executives bring in co-star Princess Penelope (voiced by Anne Hathaway) to increase its appeal, and romance soon blossoms between the clown and his new sidekick. Elsewhere, Mr Burns cuts costs at the nuclear plant by taking away the staff's free doughnuts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wins $1million on the lottery, but keeps it a secret from his family, fearing Marge's reaction if she finds out about it. He and Bart set about spending the money, and buy front-row tickets to a Coldplay concert. With the guest voice of Chris Martin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. Outraged, the detective does everything in his power to prove him wrong, even if it means stepping outside his jurisdiction. Meanwhile, chaos ensues at the precinct after a computer virus publishes everyone's internet browser history

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago hosts a Thanksgiving dinner at her apartment for all her colleagues, but the event risks turning into a disaster, especially when Holt and Peralta have to leave in a hurry to catch a thief who has stolen a large sum of money from the evidence lock-up. Can Boyle save the day?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam worry about the growing cost of their wedding, so they agree to each sell a prized possession to earn some extra cash. Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge one another to step outside their comfort zones, involving traditional sausages, pickle and Stella's belly, while the Dunphy kids are in a mischievous mood after finding an old answering machine recording of Claire breaking the news that she's pregnant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mitch and Cam prepare to walk down the aisle, but are faced with a host of hitches before they tie the knot. Pepper is forced to bring the ceremony forward by four hours because of a spreading wildfire, while one of the grooms' tuxedos has been left at the dry cleaners

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Mitch and Cam's big day beset by one disaster after another, Pepper is forced to find a new venue - only for the couple to be forced out once again. Their only option is to hold the ceremony at home - but then Sal, who supposed to be marrying them, is forced to leave. Will they ever get to say 'I do'? Elizabeth Banks guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning comedy returns - as do Cameron and Mitchell, who are back from honeymoon and determined to keep the romance alive. Cameron, however, takes it just a little step too far. The Dunphys, meanwhile, have been enjoying a relaxing summer without smart-alec Alex, who is away on a trip - although she threatens to rock the boat after arriving home early - and Gloria shows a different side after arguing with Jay about the lack of effort he puts into his appearance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Glamorous Hollywood star Sara Sloane visits Springfield and becomes infatuated with Ned Flanders, who finds himself asking Homer for dating advice. Featuring the voices of Helen Fielding and Marisa Tomei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: With changes afoot at Springfield's airport, Bart persuades Krusty to run for Congress so he can redirect the flight path of planes passing over the Simpson home. However, he soon alters his policies once elected

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: 'Scuse Me While I Miss the Sky
programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge writes a novel and succeeds in getting it published to critical acclaim in the Springfield community. Homer is delighted - until he finds out its plot, which portrays him as an uncaring husband. With the guest voices of authors Tom Clancy and Thomas Pynchon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wonders when Maggie will say her first word, which prompts Marge to reminisce about Lisa's early days and how a two-year-old Bart suffered a serious outbreak of sibling jealousy. Featuring the guest voice of Elizabeth Taylor

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. Outraged, the detective does everything in his power to prove him wrong, even if it means stepping outside his jurisdiction. Meanwhile, chaos ensues at the precinct after a computer virus publishes everyone's internet browser history

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the third elimination challenge of the series, the six teams have 10 hours to build an instantly recognisable scene from a classic TV show of their choice inside a pre-made hollow vintage TV. Guest judge Sophie Monk attempts to identify the shows, with three bonus points up for grabs if she doesn't need any clues

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: On Borneo, the final four teams get hands-on gutting fish at a bustling market and dive headfirst into a conservation mission. However, saving the planet takes a toll on the would-be eco warriors

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marge's favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Ratings for Krusty's TV show start to fall, so executives bring in co-star Princess Penelope (voiced by Anne Hathaway) to increase its appeal, and romance soon blossoms between the clown and his new sidekick. Elsewhere, Mr Burns cuts costs at the nuclear plant by taking away the staff's free doughnuts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wins $1million on the lottery, but keeps it a secret from his family, fearing Marge's reaction if she finds out about it. He and Bart set about spending the money, and buy front-row tickets to a Coldplay concert. With the guest voice of Chris Martin

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britain's favourite personalities hit the sofa to share their opinions of First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News reports on the game of bingo and the return of Oasis

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulu's Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy, Made in Chelsea, Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen and a BBC Breakfast report on the then recently appointed Pope Leo XIV. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, and Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars. Plus, reviews of Great British History Hunters, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, This Came Out of Me, Boris Johnson's appearance on Good Morning Britain, and BBC News. First shown in May 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.desc: Lisa resolves to pursue a career in astronomy, but unfortunately her decision coincides with Chief Wiggum's hare-brained new initiative to reduce crime in Springfield - by illuminating the whole town all night. With the guest voice of Eric Idle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge writes a novel and succeeds in getting it published to critical acclaim in the Springfield community. Homer is delighted - until he finds out its plot, which portrays him as an uncaring husband. With the guest voices of authors Tom Clancy and Thomas Pynchon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wonders when Maggie will say her first word, which prompts Marge to reminisce about Lisa's early days and how a two-year-old Bart suffered a serious outbreak of sibling jealousy. Featuring the guest voice of Elizabeth Taylor

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, starring Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. Outraged, the detective does everything in his power to prove him wrong, even if it means stepping outside his jurisdiction. Meanwhile, chaos ensues at the precinct after a computer virus publishes everyone's internet browser history

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the third elimination challenge of the series, the six teams have 10 hours to build an instantly recognisable scene from a classic TV show of their choice inside a pre-made hollow vintage TV. Guest judge Sophie Monk attempts to identify the shows, with three bonus points up for grabs if she doesn't need any clues

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: On Borneo, the final four teams get hands-on gutting fish at a bustling market and dive headfirst into a conservation mission. However, saving the planet takes a toll on the would-be eco warriors

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marge's favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Ratings for Krusty's TV show start to fall, so executives bring in co-star Princess Penelope (voiced by Anne Hathaway) to increase its appeal, and romance soon blossoms between the clown and his new sidekick. Elsewhere, Mr Burns cuts costs at the nuclear plant by taking away the staff's free doughnuts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wins $1million on the lottery, but keeps it a secret from his family, fearing Marge's reaction if she finds out about it. He and Bart set about spending the money, and buy front-row tickets to a Coldplay concert. With the guest voice of Chris Martin

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britain's favourite personalities hit the sofa to share their opinions of First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News reports on the game of bingo and the return of Oasis

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulu's Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy, Made in Chelsea, Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen and a BBC Breakfast report on the then recently appointed Pope Leo XIV. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, and Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars. Plus, reviews of Great British History Hunters, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, This Came Out of Me, Boris Johnson's appearance on Good Morning Britain, and BBC News. First shown in May 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James crosses over the Irish Sea to Northern Ireland, where he is joined by famous local chef Paul Rankin. Their first port of call is the Giant's Causeway, where James cooks a fish stew for the crowds, followed by a visit to a family farm in Limavady, where Paul learns how their award-winning rapeseed oil is produced. Things get competitive as the chefs compete in a hovercraft race, and finally James takes to the seas to fish for mackerel

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from his vegetable patch, the food writer demonstrates how combinations of ingredients that grow in the same place can make the ideal starting point for a dish. He also visits local allotment holders and uses their produce to create a feast

programme.desc: The food writer prepares easy recipes with classic ingredients, including sausages and mustard, pork chops with apples and cider, and carrot and coriander fritters. He also visits the Gilmore family and cooks a meal with ingredients from their allotment

programme.desc: Prue is joined by food campaigner and author Henry Dimbleby, who shows her how to make a one-pot veggie dish and lifts the lid on the school-dinner revolution he's been leading. Meanwhile, Prue's husband John is dispatched to catch dinner as he tries his hand netting trout at a nearby fish farm, while she makes an orange and polenta upside down cake

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a fresh spin on a fast-food favourite, preparing a bucket of fried chicken with rainbow slaw, sweet sticky potato wedges and charred corn on the cob, and he makes enough to feed a family of four for less than £10. The chef also shares tips on getting crispy chicken skin without having to deep-fry, and rustles up spiced sausage bake, garlic bread and a meat-free roast, as well as two very different recipes for leftover salmon

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Fellow chef Paul Rankin gives James a personal tour of Northern Ireland's capital city - his home town of Belfast - before the duo enjoy a spot of golf. James pitches up his mobile kitchen right on the green to whip up a tasty dish with bacon, scallops and apples with onion rings, and later cooks a Northern Irish classic - beef with champ, charred onions and parsley oil. Next, James is in Craigavon to visit Danni Barry, the first woman named the best chef in Ireland, who rustles up a dessert using local ingredients. Finally, the presenter visits Strangford Lough to fish for langoustines

programme.desc: Frankie continues to wrestle with her emotions following the return of old flame Steve Benson, and is forced to make the biggest decision of her life, while Matt faces financial difficulties after a burglary at Silverdale. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, James Belushi, Peter Boyle, Laurence Fishburne and Ed O'Ross

programme.desc: Four American soldiers being transported to military prison through Nazi-occupied France escape when their convoy is attacked. Initially planning to escape to neutral Switzerland, they end up helping the French resistance steal a V2 rocket. Second World War thriller, starring Bo Svenson and Peter Hooten and Fred Williamson.

programme.desc: A woman is caught in a deadly conflict between Steve Austin and a posse of hunters

programme.desc: Marshal Matt Dillon sets out to protect a would-be vigilante determined to exact revenge on the gang that murdered his mother during a robbery. Western based on the TV series, starring James Arness, Bruce Boxleitner and Amy Stock Poynton

programme.title: The Blood Beast Terror (1967)
programme.desc: A 19th-century police inspector investigates a series of strange murders, with the victims all drained of blood. His efforts to crack the case lead to a scientist performing genetic experiments, whose daughter has been transformed into a giant moth. Gothic horror, starring Peter Cushing, Wanda Ventham and Robert Flemyng

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneer's loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMille's classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise encounters an enormous mechanical monster that destroys whole planets. Kirk and the crew are sent to investigate, but soon find themselves on a collision course with the deadly machine. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A gang out to steal government laser technology rebuild a member's face to look like Steve's

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
