programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Gage goes undercover to investigate dealers selling a designer drug called White Buffalo, while Walker tries to solve the mystery of a statue that appears to cry

programme.title: In Time (2011)
programme.desc: Future scientists reverse the ageing process, allowing people to live for ever. To avoid overpopulation, time becomes a currency, with the rich living indefinitely while the poor must toil to stave off death. A factory worker acquires 100 years of time, and spends it fighting to redress the balance of power. Sci-fi thriller, starring Justin Timberlake, Amanda Seyfried and Cillian Murphy

programme.title: Alien Nation (1988)
programme.desc: A race of aliens fleeing slavery seeks shelter on Earth. One of their number becomes a cop, and is paired with a bigoted human partner to investigate a murder. However, they soon find the case leads to a secret that has devastating repercussions for the extraterrestrial community. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Caan, Mandy Patinkin and Terence Stamp

programme.title: The Hard Way (1991)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled New York cop is forced to show a pampered Hollywood actor the ropes to help him portray a policeman convincingly on screen, and the ill-matched partnership soon leads to all manner of chaos in their pursuit of a serial killer. Comedy thriller, starring Michael J Fox, James Woods, Annabella Sciorra, Christina Ricci and Stephen Lang

programme.title: American Siege (2021)
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff finds himself in a race against time when he's pressured to launch an assault on a gang of thieves who have taken a wealthy local doctor hostage. Thriller, starring Bruce Willis

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve's rekindled romance with an old flame is disrupted when she becomes the target of kidnappers

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A nuclear warhead comes into the possession of a veteran Japanese pilot. John Fujioka guest stars

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A robot duplicate of Oscar Goldman is used to steal the formula for a new energy source. Henry Jones guest stars

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A woman is caught in a deadly conflict between Steve Austin and a posse of hunters

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A gang out to steal government laser technology rebuild a member's face to look like Steve's

programme.title: Apocalypse Pompeii (2014)
programme.desc: An American tourist and her daughter take a holiday in Italy, only to get caught up in a disaster when Mount Vesuvius unexpectedly erupts. Her husband is a former special forces commando, and he gathers his old comrades in arms to join him on a rescue mission. Disaster movie, starring Adrian Paul and Jhey Castles

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Posse (1975)
programme.desc: A ruthless US marshal vows to capture a railroad bandit in a bid to further his political career. He ends up becoming the outlaw's hostage, and the men under his command turn to crime to raise the ransom money - which earns him the hatred of the voters. Western, directed by and starring Kirk Douglas. With Bruce Dern and Bo Hopkins

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Shark (1969)
programme.desc: A gunrunner goes into hiding on a Red Sea island after his shipment is destroyed. A professor hires him to explore shark-infested waters supposedly for a research project, but he soon realises the scientist is actually looking for sunken treasure, and needs someone else to risk their life finding it. Thriller, starring Burt Reynolds and Arthur Kennedy

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A time-travelling actor meets his first wife again and is forced to reassess his outlook on life

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A petty thief takes possession of a camera whose pictures predict the future. Drama, starring Fred Clark

programme.title: The Ice Road (2021)
programme.desc: After a remote diamond mine collapses in far northern Canada, a 'big-rig' ice road driver must lead an impossible rescue mission over a frozen lake to save the trapped miners. Action thriller starring Liam Neeson, Marcus Thomas and Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers (2002)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama covering the events of the first major battle in of the Vietnam War. A veteran colonel is placed in charge of an elite combat division, which is assigned to protect a landing area. They find themselves surrounded by overwhelming enemy forces, but are determined to fight to the last man. Starring Mel Gibson and Madeleine Stowe

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage (2016)
programme.desc: A US Navy cruiser delivers the atomic weapons that will eventually be used at Hiroshima and Nagasaki to their destination, only to be sunk on the return journey. The surviving crew members are left stranded in the Philippine Sea for five days, enduring starvation and constant shark attacks. Fact-based Second World War drama, starring Nicolas Cage and Tom Sizemore

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who has a history of heart complaints and is experiencing crushing pain in her chest. She thinks she may be having a heart attack. A bingo caller who has diabetes feels so unwell that his colleagues ring 999. A mother-of-nine is finding life a struggle and has collapsed on the kitchen floor with a suspected seizure. A former sergeant major and veteran of the Falklands war may be having a stroke. Plus, the paramedics encounter a condition that they cannot treat - a flat tyre

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients include 54-year-old John, who was involved in a cycling accident in which he went over his handlebars and was unconscious for 10 minutes. Sydney, who's 87, has reluctantly come to A&E after he experienced severe chest pains, while Alan has fallen and badly fractured his elbow

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Neil, 53, is rushed into hospital with severe chest and lung injuries after coming off his bike, and 40-year-old Michael is brought in with chest pain and a heart rate of up to 180bpm after collapsing on a golf course. Lastly, doctors treat 27-year-old George, who accidentally grazed his eye on a low hanging branch

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton visits Haagen-Dazs to find out why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, while Helen Lawal heads to Tanzania to see the lengths vanilla farmers go to in the production of the natural flavouring. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Surrey and Middlesex. Henry restores a pair of racing go-karts to race against restorer Guy, and Simon repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Holland Hall Hotel in Upholland, Lancashire, where two of the guests are less than impressed when the breakfast table is laid with steak knives

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Railway Inn near Hull in East Yorkshire, where young couple Lydia Perkins and Luke Mainprize feel the pressure at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Driftwood B&B in Weymouth, where guest Lygia prepares to party when she spies the host's disco balls

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Bull Hotel in Wrotham, Kent, where owner Lygia Fontanella-Deadman prides herself on a luxury stay. But a surprise leads to criticism from one couple

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Genice and Cathy want Lydia and Luke to shed some light on the wardrobe situation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council manager Charlotte hosts the first dinner party in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, where she hopes to impress electrician Steve, occupational nurse Christine, retired French teacher Meic, and teaching assistant Ainsley with an evening that features a former rugby choir as entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Steve hosts the second night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and hopes that his menu of lasagne, vegetable soup and homemade wine will impress his guests and win him the £1,000 prize. As the evening goes on, Meic decides to bare all with a revelation that shocks Christine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Occupational nurse Christine hosts the third dinner party in Llanelli, where she tries to impress her guests with a menu of family favourites and a performance by her number one rock band. Charlotte and Meic stumble across the host's messy office, and trouble brews when Ainsley tells Christine that she looks like one of her exes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired French teacher Meic hosts the fourth night of the competition in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire, and plans an authentic French menu including poulet Basquaise. Fellow diner Charlotte makes an impression when she arrives wearing an onion necklace, and the host hopes that his specially branded cremes brulees will impress his guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the competition in Llanelli, and the turn of teaching assistant Ainsley to host. She wants to educate her guests, while serving an authentic Russian-themed dinner party. However, vodka-infused pavlova and some dancing may not be enough to offset the cantankerous mood at the dinner table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Edge Accommodation in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, where owner John Whitworth is hoping to win over his guests with his unique style and personality

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Darwin Lake Holiday Village in Matlock, Derbyshire, managed by Sally McAnulty and Teresa Shirley, who pride themselves on their exclusive village feel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group head to Sands Resort Hotel and Spa in Newquay, where father-and-son team Nicholas and Tom Malcolm pride themselves on the vast facilities they have on offer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Phil Gilbert's Oak Tree Lane campsite in Bratton Clovelly, Devon, where the guests are wowed by the traditional yurts, only for arguments to cause tension

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Edge Accommodation is first, and host John wants to shut the door on some criticism. Next, Sally and Teresa want to challenge John over his comments on their hosting skills

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil reunite with some previous house-hunters to see where life has taken them. In 2014 newly-weds Liz and Carl were looking for their 'happily ever after' home in Hertfordshire and Phil found them a Victorian end-of-terrace in Tring for £395,000 which they had fully renovated after a year. In 2016 Lynne and her guide dog Lucy were searching for a new home in Bangor, north Wales. They managed to secure a bright property with a conservatory for Lynne to enjoy the light in

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the fifth heat of Britain's toughest music quiz, testing more music lovers from across the UK who are all hoping to book their spot in the Grand Final

programme.title: Panda
programme.desc: The body of the owner of an olive grove is found following what looks like a ritualised murder. The prime suspects are three panicked teenagers who were filming pranks at the scene and whose friend has been missing since the murder. Add in a ghostly apparition and masked figures and the question is: what dark games have been played in the forest? In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 78-year-old man has difficulty breathing after breaking several ribs by tripping over a kerb, and doctors discover that a woman is in the latter stages of pancreatic cancer when they treat her for sepsis. Elsewhere, a 32-year-old woman is treated after bruising her neck and face when she slipped on wet decking on a night out with friends

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a 13-year-old girl who has diabetes and has collapsed at home experiencing a hypo. Treated on the same shift is a 51-year-old man who's also struggling to control his blood sugars. The paramedics suspect a condition called ketoacidosis, which is life threatening if not dealt with fast. A handstand gone wrong leaves a teenager in agony with a suspected fractured shoulder. A baby boy is struggling to breath and paramedics are called to a 24-year-old man who has autism and may have had a seizure

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who's tripped over her laptop cable and has badly broken her leg. She endures a night with next to no pain relief before eventually ringing 999. A mental health patient experiences an episode of psychosis at a homeless hostel. As she has threatened staff and set off fire alarms, the police have become involved. A man is found passed out on a city centre street wearing carpet slippers, a young woman with epilepsy has a seizure on a bus, while a man who fails to make it back to his bed after a trip to the bathroom is forced to seek help

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 78-year-old man has difficulty breathing after breaking several ribs by tripping over a kerb, and doctors discover that a woman is in the latter stages of pancreatic cancer when they treat her for sepsis. Elsewhere, a 32-year-old woman is treated after bruising her neck and face when she slipped on wet decking on a night out with friends

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This contest kicks off in north Norfolk at The Hero, run by best friends Harry Farrow and Rowan Glennie, who both quit university to follow their dream of becoming hospitality entrepreneurs. Debbie and Arthur from The Cleasewood Guest House are wowed by the view, but Shoukry and Waguih from Four Saints Brig y Don wonder if size really does matter. During an afternoon cheese-wrapping contest at a local dairy farm, Helen and Suzanne from Peel Hey show their perfectionist side, while Arthur and Debbie's sneaky tactics raise eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Cleasewood Guest House in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, a labour of love for rookie B&B owners Debbie and Arthur Callaghan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Peel Hey on the Wirral, where Helen Holmes and Suzanne Hill hope their years of experience will give them the edge over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shoukry Rozek welcomes his rivals to Four Saints Brig y Don in Llandudno, north Wales, where the sea views impress some guests, although the buffet breakfast proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired tugboat captain and keen skier Geoff is torn between his love of the sea and the mountains. Taking command, Laura Hamilton sets out to find him a holiday home around the coastal town of Adra, near the Sierra Nevada in southern Spain, that offers the perfect balance. With support from Geoff's sister Jackie, Laura lines up five options for him to consider within his £120,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Five years ago, Susan and Matt honeymooned in Crete, and nowhere else has had quite the same impact on them. Now Matt has retired, they've decided it's high time they bought their very own property there. They'd love a two-bedroom villa that they can move to permanently, so call on the house-hunting talents of Laura Hamilton to find them the best option for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King is in Spain's Orihuela Costa to help Donna and Graeme find their perfect holiday home. They're after a light and airy two or three-bedroom apartment. Leah seeks out five impressive properties for the couple's budget of £75,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Dave from West Sussex want to fulfil their long-held dream of owning a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France. With a budget of £200,000, Jonnie Irwin lines up five potential options, but whether any will prove to be the perfect place remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to south-east London, where first to host is 25-year-old online journalist Leah, who hopes her Mediterranean feast of mixed-mezze and lamb kleftiko will win her the £1,000 cash prize. Other contestants include art events organiser Gina, Italian personal trainer Vincenzo and pub manager Josh

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Vincenzo hosts the second night in south-east London, where he hopes to impress his guests with traditional recipes handed down through his Italian family and a spot of salsa dancing. The guests also engage in some dicey debating - ensuring there is never a dull moment to the party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bar manager Josh presents the third dinner party in south-east London, and hopes to wow his guests with a menu inspired by beer. However, they may not be too impressed to find their host's favourite tipple featuring in every course. Josh also cuts corners in the kitchen and tries to hide the fact he has had part of his main meal delivered

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Texan psychologist David hosts the fourth night of the competition in south-east London, and takes inspiration from his passion for Mexican food. However, his guests are surprised by his love of spice, and his elaborate entertainment and controversial conversations make it a party to remember

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition in south-east London it is part-time event organiser Gina's turn to throw a dinner party. She rolls out an evening of fine dining inspired by her love of cookery courses, but her culinary prowess fails to make an impact on Vincenzo, as he reveals he already ate dinner at home due to his belief that women can't cook. Meanwhile, Leah reveals a surprising beauty secret from her youth during the main course, before a self-penned poem from the host brings tears to David's eyes, and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Grace and Conor host the week's first visit at The White Lion near Crewe, where value is at the heart of their business. And it's that bang for their buck that has the B&Bers waxing lyrical - apart from one, who's gives the hosts a grilling over their breakfast options in the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Laura and Claudia welcome the B&Bers to Foxlow Grange in Buxton, Derbyshire, where they're wowed by the interior design. But bathroom problems besiege Sue's stay, while two guests feel worryingly exposed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Carmarthenshire, where hosts Eirlys and Demelza take pride in the character of their self-catering cottages. The competitive spirit of all the guests is on show during a trip to a farm, and accusations of tactics start flying

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sue and Roger host the final visit of the week to Tedstone Log Cabins in Herefordshire. Everyone agrees the hand-crafted huts are charming, but there are immediate questions about the value for money. Roger is left reeling by some comments in their feedback, leaving him ready for a battle on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a particularly competitive week with plenty of gripes about value for money, the four sets of owners meet for one last time to learn who has won the best value B&B of the week. They soon discover what the other competitors think of their businesses by opening the cash-filled envelopes that contain what their rivals believe their hosts should receive

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 56-year-old Dave, who is brought to St George's after falling from a ladder at work. Doctors are concerned that he may have life-changing damage to his spine. Meanwhile, three-year-old Alf arrives in resus with his parents after being hit by a car

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at the entrance to a block of flats, but manages to call for help before collapsing. A young man has had 13 seizures in one day and needs urgent medical care. While treating a patient, the paramedics discover that he has allegedly assaulted someone else, and now have two patients on their hands. Plus, a taxi driver has a woman who is having a seizure in the back of his cab

Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at the entrance to a block of flats, but manages to call for help before collapsing. A young man has had 13 seizures in one day and needs urgent medical care. While treating a patient, the paramedics discover that he has allegedly assaulted someone else, and now have two patients on their hands. Plus, a taxi driver has a woman who is having a seizure in the back of his cab

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 78-year-old man has difficulty breathing after breaking several ribs by tripping over a kerb, and doctors discover that a woman is in the latter stages of pancreatic cancer when they treat her for sepsis. Elsewhere, a 32-year-old woman is treated after bruising her neck and face when she slipped on wet decking on a night out with friends

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This contest kicks off in north Norfolk at The Hero, run by best friends Harry Farrow and Rowan Glennie, who both quit university to follow their dream of becoming hospitality entrepreneurs. Debbie and Arthur from The Cleasewood Guest House are wowed by the view, but Shoukry and Waguih from Four Saints Brig y Don wonder if size really does matter. During an afternoon cheese-wrapping contest at a local dairy farm, Helen and Suzanne from Peel Hey show their perfectionist side, while Arthur and Debbie's sneaky tactics raise eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Cleasewood Guest House in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, a labour of love for rookie B&B owners Debbie and Arthur Callaghan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Peel Hey on the Wirral, where Helen Holmes and Suzanne Hill hope their years of experience will give them the edge over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shoukry Rozek welcomes his rivals to Four Saints Brig y Don in Llandudno, north Wales, where the sea views impress some guests, although the buffet breakfast proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired tugboat captain and keen skier Geoff is torn between his love of the sea and the mountains. Taking command, Laura Hamilton sets out to find him a holiday home around the coastal town of Adra, near the Sierra Nevada in southern Spain, that offers the perfect balance. With support from Geoff's sister Jackie, Laura lines up five options for him to consider within his £120,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Five years ago, Susan and Matt honeymooned in Crete, and nowhere else has had quite the same impact on them. Now Matt has retired, they've decided it's high time they bought their very own property there. They'd love a two-bedroom villa that they can move to permanently, so call on the house-hunting talents of Laura Hamilton to find them the best option for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King is in Spain's Orihuela Costa to help Donna and Graeme find their perfect holiday home. They're after a light and airy two or three-bedroom apartment. Leah seeks out five impressive properties for the couple's budget of £75,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Dave from West Sussex want to fulfil their long-held dream of owning a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France. With a budget of £200,000, Jonnie Irwin lines up five potential options, but whether any will prove to be the perfect place remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to south-east London, where first to host is 25-year-old online journalist Leah, who hopes her Mediterranean feast of mixed-mezze and lamb kleftiko will win her the £1,000 cash prize. Other contestants include art events organiser Gina, Italian personal trainer Vincenzo and pub manager Josh

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Vincenzo hosts the second night in south-east London, where he hopes to impress his guests with traditional recipes handed down through his Italian family and a spot of salsa dancing. The guests also engage in some dicey debating - ensuring there is never a dull moment to the party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bar manager Josh presents the third dinner party in south-east London, and hopes to wow his guests with a menu inspired by beer. However, they may not be too impressed to find their host's favourite tipple featuring in every course. Josh also cuts corners in the kitchen and tries to hide the fact he has had part of his main meal delivered

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Texan psychologist David hosts the fourth night of the competition in south-east London, and takes inspiration from his passion for Mexican food. However, his guests are surprised by his love of spice, and his elaborate entertainment and controversial conversations make it a party to remember

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition in south-east London it is part-time event organiser Gina's turn to throw a dinner party. She rolls out an evening of fine dining inspired by her love of cookery courses, but her culinary prowess fails to make an impact on Vincenzo, as he reveals he already ate dinner at home due to his belief that women can't cook. Meanwhile, Leah reveals a surprising beauty secret from her youth during the main course, before a self-penned poem from the host brings tears to David's eyes, and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. programme.title: Rum & Revolution: History of Havana
programme.desc: In the 1950s, Havana shines as a vibrant metropolis - alive with music, casinos, and cabarets. However, beneath the allure lies a city controlled by the American mafia, where luxury contrasts sharply with the poverty endured by most Cubans. American tourists escape Prohibition and moral restrictions back home. Icons like Ernest Hemingway, Frank Sinatra, and Ava Gardner revel in the city?s rhythms, frequenting hotspots like the Hotel Nacional and the Tropicana nightclub. Yet beneath the surface, corruption and oppression grip Cuba

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A network of tunnels built by George IV underneath Brighton's Royal Pavilion as he had grown so fat that he was embarrassed by his appearance and wanted to visit his beloved horses unobserved by cruel critics. Plus, the story behind the Diana, Princess of Wales statue in Kensington Palace and how this piece of art ended up demonstrating the fractured relationship of her two sons

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of Kensington Palace, which is currently the official London residence of the Duke and Duchess of Gloucester, the Duke and Duchess of Kent, and Prince and Princess Michael of Kent. Kate Williams also tells the tale of Elizabeth I's make-up, which was so poisonous that it would be illegal today, with her foundation made of lead and vinegar, her rouge from lead carbonate, and her lipstick from ground alabaster, with side-effects including digestive problems and respiratory issues

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A look at the lost palace of Whitehall, which was destroyed by fire in 1698, with the Banqueting House the sole surviving building from the complex. Plus, the story of a couple from Manchester who decided to invite the Queen to their wedding in 2012, while Kate Williams explores the narcissistic motivations behind the Field of the Cloth of Gold, one of the biggest Tudor parties in history

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A look at the development of Buckingham Palace over the past 100 years, and the hidden messages in the gold dress worn by the Duchess of Cambridge at the premiere of James Bond film No Time to Die. Kate Williams examines the dark secrets of Queen Isabella, who was jilted by her husband Edward II in favour of another man and consequently plotted his downfall

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A network of tunnels built by George IV underneath Brighton's Royal Pavilion as he had grown so fat that he was embarrassed by his appearance and wanted to visit his beloved horses unobserved by cruel critics. Plus, the story behind the Diana, Princess of Wales statue in Kensington Palace and how this piece of art ended up demonstrating the fractured relationship of her two sons

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of Kensington Palace, which is currently the official London residence of the Duke and Duchess of Gloucester, the Duke and Duchess of Kent, and Prince and Princess Michael of Kent. Kate Williams also tells the tale of Elizabeth I's make-up, which was so poisonous that it would be illegal today, with her foundation made of lead and vinegar, her rouge from lead carbonate, and her lipstick from ground alabaster, with side-effects including digestive problems and respiratory issues

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.sub-title: And I Will Make Them One Nation
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines the history of the Stuarts, who grappled with the chaos of three separate kingdoms, multiple religions and civil war during the 17th century. In the opening episode, she looks at James VI of Scotland's attempts to unite his country with England and Ireland and persuade his subjects to feel more British

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: After Charles I's disastrous attempt to impose political and religious uniformity throughout England, Scotland and Ireland, both the Stuart dynasty and its three kingdoms fell into an abyss. In this episode, Dr Clare Jackson reveals how the unprecedented religious violence of the Wars of the Three Kingdoms shaped British political culture and subsequent constitutional crises

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines how the Stuarts became fatally divided by religion, with brothers in opposition and two daughters supporting the overthrow of their father. After the Catholic James II was deposed by the Protestant William of Orange in 1688, Scotland lost its sovereignty and became part of Great Britain in 1707, while Ireland was reduced from a kingdom to a colony

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.sub-title: Dundee - A Repair for a Scottish Football Legend
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea and Lucia Scalisi are in Dundee, where regeneration of the waterfront has sparked change throughout the city. In the shadow of the celebrated RSS Discovery, Britain's oldest wooden ship, HMS Unicorn, is moored around the corner and a little neglected. Beloved by many, the 200 year-old vessel is in need of immediate preservation, so the team lends a hand. Plus, master hatter Jayesh Vaghela sets about restoring a much-loved Dundee United football cap and Lucia learns about the restoration of a lost Charles Rennie Mackintosh-designed tearoom interior

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: As Gary Bell waits for news about whether he will be offered a reprieve, Geordie and Phil discover a reason to arrest Eddie Jones, a violent husband who beats his wife. However, when Sidney arrives at the station the following morning, he finds Geordie with his knuckles bruised and Eddie dead on a stretcher. Chief Inspector Benson questions his innocence, and although the vicar leaps to his friend's defence, no one can verify his whereabouts when Eddie was killed. At the vicarage, a remark about Mrs Maguire's love life and the accidental loss of some sentimental postcards leave the housekeeper and Leonard feeling raw and misunderstood

programme.title: xXx (2002)
programme.desc: Extreme sports star Xander Cage finds himself in trouble when his daredevil exploits land him behind bars. However, he is offered an intriguing escape route, courtesy of National Security Agent Augustus Gibbons - who thinks the adrenaline junkie is the perfect man to bring down a gang of international terrorists in Prague. Action adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Samuel L Jackson, Asia Argento, Marton Csokas and Michael Roof

programme.title: xXx: The Next Level (2005)
programme.desc: The American secretary of defence forms a covert military organisation with the intention of assassinating the president. A government spymaster is ready to foil the plot but, since his top agent is dead, he has to recruit an imprisoned soldier to help him. Action sequel, starring Ice Cube, Samuel L Jackson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (2003)
programme.desc: A cop's career is seemingly over when he accidentally shoots a hostage while thwarting a bank robbery. He is given the chance to redeem himself by joining an elite unit headed by a veteran sergeant. Their mission is to escort an international crime lord in custody as he is taken to prison. However, they hit a snag when their prisoner offers a multimillion-dollar reward to anyone who breaks him out of jail, placing them under attack from every criminal in the city. Action thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson and Colin Farrell

programme.title: xXx (2002)
programme.desc: Extreme sports star Xander Cage finds himself in trouble when his daredevil exploits land him behind bars. However, he is offered an intriguing escape route, courtesy of National Security Agent Augustus Gibbons - who thinks the adrenaline junkie is the perfect man to bring down a gang of international terrorists in Prague. Action adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Samuel L Jackson, Asia Argento, Marton Csokas and Michael Roof

programme.title: xXx: The Next Level (2005)
programme.desc: The American secretary of defence forms a covert military organisation with the intention of assassinating the president. A government spymaster is ready to foil the plot but, since his top agent is dead, he has to recruit an imprisoned soldier to help him. Action sequel, starring Ice Cube, Samuel L Jackson and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Jurassic Park III (2001)
programme.desc: Palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant is lured to a dinosaur-infested island by a divorced couple who offer to fund his research, unaware their real motive is to find their missing son - and that the creatures on the island are far more intelligent than anyone suspected. Action adventure sequel, starring Sam Neill, William H Macy, Tea Leoni and Alessandro Nivola

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefact's twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varley's comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Troy (2004)
programme.desc: A Trojan prince elopes with the king of Sparta's wife, sparking a bitter and bloody war between a mighty alliance of Greek kings and the city of Troy, whose champion engages in intense personal conflict with the enemy's most formidable warrior. Wolfgang Petersen's adventure, inspired by Homer's epic poem The Iliad, with Brad Pitt, Eric Bana, Orlando Bloom, Brian Cox, Sean Bean and Peter O'Toole

programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick (2004)
programme.desc: Fugitive Riddick evades capture by bounty hunters and steals their spacecraft, only to run into an even bigger threat - fanatical cult members on a sinister mission to kill or convert anyone who crosses their path as they seek galactic domination. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Vin Diesel reprising his role from Pitch Black alongside Judi Dench, Alexa Davalos and Thandwie Newton.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor (2008)
programme.desc: Daredevil explorers Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are called into action when their son accidentally resurrects the evil Chinese Emperor Han from his ancient tomb. The family now faces a race against time to prevent the merciless leader from awakening his vast terracotta army in a plot to take over the world. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello, Jet Li and Michelle Yeoh.

Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor (2008)
programme.desc: Daredevil explorers Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are called into action when their son accidentally resurrects the evil Chinese Emperor Han from his ancient tomb. The family now faces a race against time to prevent the merciless leader from awakening his vast terracotta army in a plot to take over the world. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello, Jet Li and Michelle Yeoh.

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging hero's darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncle's murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his father's villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm (2005)
programme.desc: Travelling conmen Wilhelm and Jacob Grimm convince naive country folk that demons are making mischief in their villages - and then charge the gullible yokels for getting rid of the phoney beasts. However, their scam catches up with them when they are tasked to find some missing children by a local governor - leading to an encounter with a real witch in an enchanted wood. Terry Gilliam's period fantasy adventure, with Heath Ledger, Matt Damon, Jonathan Pryce and Monica Bellucci

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm (2005)
programme.desc: Travelling conmen Wilhelm and Jacob Grimm convince naive country folk that demons are making mischief in their villages - and then charge the gullible yokels for getting rid of the phoney beasts. However, their scam catches up with them when they are tasked to find some missing children by a local governor - leading to an encounter with a real witch in an enchanted wood. Terry Gilliam's period fantasy adventure, with Heath Ledger, Matt Damon, Jonathan Pryce and Monica Bellucci

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: Don't Let's Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (2025)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti

programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Suzy Lamplugh Mystery
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary exploring one of the most baffling cases in recent history - the mysterious 1986 disappearance of the London estate agent. With no body, Suzi was officially declared dead, presumed murdered, in 1994

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Amy (2015)
programme.desc: Documentary portrait of soul, jazz and R'n'B singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse, whose untimely death in July 2011 followed a well-publicised history of drugs and alcohol abuse. programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past

Here, Raksha Dave, Alex Langlands and assorted volunteers and archaeologists hunt for a lost garden planted as part of the celebrations, while there is also a visit to Kenilworth Castle to investigate an Elizabethan garden still in full bloom today. This episodes focuses on Colditz Castle, the Great Escape and the bold Warburg Wire Job

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII

By September 6, the city's anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits the south of England, discovering Britain's oldest shoe through a popular form of archaeology - mud larking. While in Kent, Alice visits a dig where one of the largest and oldest stone hand axes in the UK has been uncovered. Another archaeological dig reveals Henry V's lost shipyard on the south coast, and in Dover, Alice learns about top-secret Second World War defences from Jon Barker as he investigates the formerly classified weapons as well as the site where they were found at

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: The story of animation film producer Walt Disney and how the iconic Disney brand he established continues to shape generations as a cultural and worldwide phenomenon. The story starts with Walt in his early days in Hollywood, when he quickly lost his first successful cartoon character to a powerful middleman. This opening episode also focuses on the birth of iconic character Mickey Mouse and how he began as a pencil sketch and rocketed to lasting fame

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: How, while facing soaring costs, mounting criticism and a tight deadline, film producer Walt Disney managed to create his first full-length feature film - 1937's Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs. This spearheaded a rise of the billion-dollar business of animated movies

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: The obstacles Walt Disney overcame to create his company's first theme park. Instead of just thrill rides, the visitor enjoyed an immersive journey into a story, akin to being inside a movie

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Amid financial troubles, Disney hired an ingenious marketing whiz who helped them figure out how to bring their beloved characters off the screen and into the hands of millions. Mickey Mouse became the first celebrity face to grace a cereal box and from that moment, the licensing of Disney products becomes a lucrative industry and the gold standard for multimedia corporations all over the world

programme.title: How Disney Built America

programme.title: How Disney Built America

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts travels to Bamburgh, Northumberland, to learn about the generations of Anglo Saxons who lived and worked there, gaining an insight into the illnesses they suffered and the societies in which they lived. She visits the Sutton Hoo site, as well as a pioneering project in Sittingbourne, Kent, which was set up following the unearthing of an Anglo Saxon cemetery, and looks at the Staffordshire hoard discovered by a metal detector in 2009

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts finds out about discoveries that shed light on the Tudor Age, visiting excavations at Shakespeare's first theatre in London's Shoreditch and at his last home in Stratford-upon-Avon, where clues reveal his economical use of money. In Wales, she meets a team of archaeologists learning about the realities of Henry VIII's dissolution of the monasteries, while the history of a forgotten royal palace is uncovered on the banks of the Thames

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists' understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canada's Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster reveals how life has learnt to adapt quickly in the ever-changing volcanic landscape, resulting in species that exist nowhere else in the world. David investigates the driving forces behind their evolution, exploring the appearance and behaviour of remarkable creatures and vegetation including giant whale sharks, marine iguanas and seemingly normal dandelion seeds that grow into plants the size of trees

programme.title: David Attenborough's Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.desc: The ship is attacked by an unidentified enemy vessel, forcing the crew to work frantically to get the new phase cannons to operate. Archer is horrified to realise that no one knows Reed well enough to give him a personalised birthday gift. Scott Bakula stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew discovers a planet harbouring a race in need of medical and scientific assistance, which leads Dr Phlox to recall his own past. Starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew members are ambushed by a hostile Klingon when they board a stricken vessel, and find themselves stranded on the floundering ship. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Marauding aliens put the crew to sleep, but Chakotay's knowledge of dreams helps him keep his eyes open long enough to save the day. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven stumbles across a deserted Starfleet vessel on the edge of the Alpha Quadrant, so the crew tries to send a message home - but the transmission's failure presents more problems than anticipated

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew receives letters from home bearing both good and bad news, while Tuvok and Seven are captured by an alien ship, forcing Janeway to prepare the Voyager for battle. Sci-fi drama, starring Tim Russ, Jeri Ryan and Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Life forms are detected on a Hirogen ship, prompting Chakotay, Tuvok, Paris and Janeway to beam aboard and investigate. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven reacts violently to an obnoxious alien arms dealer, revealing a disturbing episode from her past. Sci-fi action with the starship crew, starring Kate Mulgrew and Jeri Ryan

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies, while the remaining members deal with recent losses and Rick comes up with a stop-gap plan. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of people struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Tyreese, Michonne and Bob continue to scour the Veterinary Medical Centre on foot in search of medicine. Meanwhile, Rick and Carol head to a nearby town, where they find two uninfected stragglers. Starring Andrew Lincoln and Melissa McBride

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel struggles to care for the sick as problems in the cell block escalate, and with every patient he loses, another walker is added to the ranks of the undead. Meanwhile, Rick and Carl defend the prison from the shambling hordes as the fences begin give way. Starring Andrew Lincoln and Chandler Riggs

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Part two of two. Nick investigates another Wildesheer killing, and discovers he is dealing with more than one of the creatures. Adalind goes into labour while fleeing her enemies

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank search for a murderer who is killing military veterans from a platoon that was involved in horrific war crimes

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: Tensions run high in the aftermath of Emma's capture and Ash finds herself rejected and alone. As Candy grieves for her mother, forbidden love blossoms between Genevieve and Drew until a stowaway Commonworld guard is found slaughtered aboard the ship. With no idea who or what has killed the guard, the gang must push aside their anger and betrayal to try and defeat an unknown flesh-eating killer loose on the spaceship. Meanwhile, at Commonworld HQ, Rebecca prepares to meet an old enemy

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: Ash wants to try to rescue Emma from a Commonworld base, however Tula thinks it is a suicide mission and opts for something with better odds - poker. When Ash is confronted with the lure of home and a maternal embrace, will she be tempted to betray the gang?

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: As the crew embark on the final leg of their journey to Arcadia, a collision with an asteroid draws their attention to a covert Commonworld tracker attached to the Hemlock. As they try to remove it and establish who the spy is, Drew and Tula face off over Genevieve, Candy rediscovers her alien sense of smell and Verona's suspicions of Ash resurface

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: Mickey 17 (2025)
programme.desc: In 2054, criminal Mickey Barnes signs up to be a worker who agrees to be reprinted every time he perishes. He flees Earth with friend and accomplice Timo on an interstellar mission to the remote colony of Niflheim, masterminded by Kenneth Marshall and his wife, Ylfa. The 17th iteration of Mickey is presumed dead after a close encounter with creatures on the planet's surface, but is saved from a grim fate, and when he arrives back at base, Mickey meets his reprinted self. Director Bong Joon Ho's sci-fi comedy, starring Robert Pattinson, Naomi Ackie, Mark Ruffalo, Toni Collette and Steven Yeun

programme.title: It (2017)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1989, a group of bullied kids band together to destroy a shape-shifting monster, which disguises itself as a clown and preys on the children of their small New England town. Part one of a two-part Horror based on the Stephen King novel, starring Bill Skarsgard, Jaeden Lieberher and Sophia Lillis

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bourne's long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: It (2017)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1989, a group of bullied kids band together to destroy a shape-shifting monster, which disguises itself as a clown and preys on the children of their small New England town. Part one of a two-part Horror based on the Stephen King novel, starring Bill Skarsgard, Jaeden Lieberher and Sophia Lillis

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow (2014)
programme.desc: An inexperienced military officer is sent to the front line in a war against an alien invasion, and dies within minutes. However, at the point of death, he is transported back in time to relive his last day again. As he faces the same battle over and over again, the experience he gains turns him into the ultimate warrior. Sci-fi adventure based on Hiroshi Sakurazaka's novel All You Need Is Kill, starring Tom Cruise, Emily Blunt and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: The Radleys (2024)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family hide a dark secret, but eventually parents Helen and Peter are forced to confront who they are, with the help of Peter's twin brother, Will. Director Euros Lyn's horror comedy co-written by Jo Brand, starring Kelly Macdonald, Damian Lewis and Sophia Di Martino

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow (2014)
programme.desc: An inexperienced military officer is sent to the front line in a war against an alien invasion, and dies within minutes. However, at the point of death, he is transported back in time to relive his last day again. Sci-fi adventure based on Hiroshi Sakurazaka's novel All You Need Is Kill, starring Tom Cruise, Emily Blunt and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly travels to the 21st century, where he has to save his children from a terrible fate. However, this proves to have unforeseen consequences when the future version of arch enemy Biff sees a chance to rewrite history for his own benefit, leaving Marty stuck in a twisted parallel universe. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Michael J Fox and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Ag Triall ar Chill na Martra
programme.desc: Comórtas Peile na Gaeltachta is widely regarded as one of the most important annual events in the Gaeltacht. The football competition which began in 1969 brings together clubs from across the Gaeltacht and Irish language communities. In 2024, during the June Bank holiday weekend, Cumann Peile Cill na Martra in Gaeltacht Mhúscraí hosted the event. This documentary follows the festival organisers as they seek to successfully host the event as well as players, managers and supporters from the teams competing in the tournament

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the US air force's department of material command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The bride-to-be is shocked when she cannot fit into her wedding dress just three weeks before the big day. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Peggy decides to attend Molly's hen party when she discovers Mike's errant father has arrived early for a night on the town with the boys. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell, Melissa McCarthy and Rondi Reed

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An Existential Crisis and a Bear That Makes Bubbles

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Crappy Frozen Ice-Cream and an Organ-Grinder's Monkey
programme.desc: George Sr and Sheldon dine with President Hagemeyer and a university benefactor, while Georgie gives Missy some brotherly advice when Mary won't let her go to the school dance. Dale and June convince Meemaw to attend their son's wedding

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny discovers she has a dedicated group of fans from her Serial Ape-ist days when she accompanies Leonard to a comic-con. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch at Penny's flat, and stress over the baby's arrival prompts Howard to make an impulsive purchase

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.sub-title: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
