programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard finds out that he has a half-brother, Sheldon and Amy have a platonic sleepover, and Penny gets an offer to audition for a Kevin Smith film. American comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is asked to create a message on the off-chance a Nasa mission discovers alien life, and the guys fight over what he should do. Penny contemplates a return to acting. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard questions his engineering abilities when he and Sheldon can't get a toy drone to fly. A cancelled flight almost stops Leonard from giving the commencement address at his former high school, while Raj pits his parents against each other when his father cuts him off financially

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The boys want to become more sporty, so Barry Kripke leads them in a fencing lesson, while Penny, Amy and Bernadette help Stuart, who wants to attract more female customers to the comic-book store

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After more than five years of dating, Sheldon and Amy spend their first night together, while Leonard, Howard and Raj must decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket. Plus, Sheldon's Obi-Wan advises him on his difficult relationship decisions. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with recurring guest star Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets more than she bargained for when Leonard agrees to meet a psychiatrist on her behalf, while Sheldon and Raj collaborate on an astronomical discovery. Stuart moves out, but Howard and Bernadette's happiness is short-lived. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After being forced to deal with a sick Sheldon, the rest of the gang try to treat themselves to a Sheldon-free weekend. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, guest starring June Squibb

programme.desc: Mike's religious beliefs have kept him from seeing a doctor about his huge growth, and Kylie debates whether to remove her birthmark

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Kenny's rare condition causes hundreds of lumps to grow all over his body. Plus, Paula's painful and swollen feet ooze a foul-smelling substance

programme.desc: A professor instructs the members of his class to research a project on sexual fantasies, but gets more than he bargained for as the students set out to broaden their horizons in some surprising directions. Comedy, starring George Baker and Felicity Devonshire

programme.title: Some Like It Sexy (1969)
programme.desc: A young man in swinging London has a series of sexual misadventures with women from all walks of life, including a hippie, a high society lady's daughter, and a salvation army officer. Erotic comedy, starring Christopher Matthews and Yolande Turner

programme.title: Inside Out (1975)
programme.desc: A conman assembles a gang of crooks to retrieve a cache of gold bullion hidden in Germany since the end of the Second World War. However, the only person who knows its location is an imprisoned Nazi war criminal, so they first have to spring him from jail and then return him to his cell once they have the loot - without the authorities knowing. Comedy thriller, with Telly Savalas, James Mason, Robert Culp and Gunter Meisner

programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man is accused of filing a retaliatory restraining order against a co-worker who loses his job because of his actions.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man with over a dozen arrests related to assault is incensed when his own mother and sister accuse him of theft and assault.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Parents sue a motorist for hitting their daughter while she was crossing the street; they admit that they were not watching her when she was injured.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man is accused of pouring a pitcher of water into a TV set and slashing tires after an argument with his sister over Halloween candy.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A mother claims a day care centre had a cockroach infestation and mishandled a baby with a weak spine, but only after she was allegedly fired.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Shoe Rapist
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South Yorkshire to explore the bizarre case of a man dubbed 'The Rotherham Shoe Rapist', who left a town living in fear.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Family Murders
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets former Metropolitan Police Detective Inspector Tony Bishop to find out how he helped solve the case of the murder of the entire Chohan family.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Child Killers
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious story of the murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: A Mistress Scorned
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets former Metropolitan Police Detective Inspector Tony Bishop to learn how he helped solve the fatal poisoning of Lakhvinder Cheema in West London.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Gangland Murders
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Manchester to examine the gang violence, and turf wars, which have shaped the criminal landscape of one of the UK's most bustling cities.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Dog Walker Murder
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Superintendent Marina Ericson of Norfolk Police to discover how she and her team brought random knife killer Alexander Palmer to justice.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: Shifting explanations and emerging evidence lead to the successful conviction of Michael Hardy in Manchester.

programme.title: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: The story of what happened when an elderly woman died, and her daughter-in-law first notified the police, leading to a suspicious discovery.

programme.title: Fatal Fall: Murder or Accident?
programme.desc: The case of mother-of-three Nada Huranieh, who was found dead on the patio under an open second floor window at home by her 14-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clergyman uncovers secrets, hypocrisy and murder at a finishing school for young ladies. Mystery, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Dwayne attends the funeral of local barber Cedrik Verga and shortly after is puzzled to receive a message from beyond the grave - a text from the deceased claiming 'I was murdered'. Given that his phone was in the coffin, is this a sick prank or something altogether more sinister? Humphrey agrees to investigate, and they soon find evidence to rule out his death from natural causes. Meanwhile, Humphrey demonstrates his culinary skills to Florence and the rest of the team

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When an arsonist begins terrorising a neighbourhood with car bombs, Charlie and Rex race to find the next target before the case goes up in smoke

programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie receives a call from a killer who tells her he will claim his victim within minutes. As she rushes to track him down, she realises he knows about her remarkable memory and is determined to use it against her. As the list of victims grows, the detective pushes herself to work out if the murderer is a vengeful criminal from her past, or someone connected to her sister's murder. Jane Curtin (3rd Rock from the Sun) joins the cast

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey is delighted when his Aunt Mary, the woman who inspired his love of puzzle-solving, arrives for a visit. But when she becomes the only witness to a fellow tourist's death - seemingly thrown from his hotel balcony in the middle of the night- she finds herself slap bang in the middle of a murder investigation. Meanwhile, JP takes relationship advice from Humphrey after confessing his feelings for Rosey - leaving him more confused than ever. Wendy Craig, Keith Allen and Susie Amy guest star in the island whodunit

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The inspector and his ambitious sergeant John Bacchus investigate the murder of Dolores Kenny, a black woman. She is a regular attender of a local club's soul all-nighters, events popular with factory workers from across the racial divide. Gently begins to uncover evidence of prejudice within the local community and his own police force as he seeks to identify the victim's killer. Detective drama set in 1968, starring Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby, with Lenora Crichlow, Craig Conway, Pippa Bennett-Warner and Maggie O'Neill

programme.title: Death in Paradise

Everything points to suicide - except for the fact that the victim only painted one fingernail. With guest appearances by Denis Lawson, Elizabeth Berrington and Jemima Rooper

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwayne's assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank O'Toole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victim's wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.desc: Actress and writer Daisy May Cooper, quiz guru Richard Osman, actress, comedian and writer Diane Morgan, and journalist and broadcaster Rory Reid join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by actors Kevin Bishop and Brian Blessed, comedian Josh Widdicombe and historian Kate Williams, who aim to help the team captains deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts an extended edition of the panel show, and invites Jason Manford, Sara Pascoe, Jeremy Clarkson and Alan Davies to answer questions on the subject of 'noble rot'. Since the questions are impossible to answer, points are awarded for being interesting rather than correct

programme.title: Frankie Boyle's New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.desc: Leslie refuses to give in to the demands of a local Native American leader, so he puts a curse on the town's Harvest Festival. Comedy, starring Amy Poehler

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Progreso detain a man who makes a dash back towards Mexico, and the team in Laredo uncovers methamphetamine concealed in a shipment of landscaping stone

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man wanted for serious sexual offences is apprehended in Progreso, and agents intercept a group of migrants moments after they cross the Rio Grande river

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage deal with a marine SOS in the aftermath of a tropical cyclone in the Gove Peninsula, and Shaun and Sarah chase a jackpot of junk as their fortunes flip

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef takes a culinary tour of France to discover what Britain's neighbours have to teach us. He begins his trip in Dieppe, where he prepares freshly caught turbot, forages for sea herbs along the Bay of the Somme, and cooks a seafood gratin. He then heads for southern Champagne, a region that was a favourite of Renoir

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guest players Rhod Gilbert, Jamie Laing, Tracy-Ann Oberman and Claudia Winkleman, who aim to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse borrows a vintage Porsche from an old pal, so he and Bob Mortimer travel in style to the Avon in Hampshire, where they are fishing for roach, dace and river carp - a species they have yet to target. During the trip, Bob Mortimer makes the most of their treehouse accommodation and Ted has a blind date with a Patterdale called Effie - so the duo give the terrier a pep talk on the does and don'ts of doggie dating

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer venture to Sutton Lake, a sequestered lake in Shropshire, where they have their eyes set on catching a crucian carp. This is the duo's second attempt to net the elusive fish and they are changing tactics - staying overnight in bivvies in the hope of guaranteeing success. Away from the angling, the duo reminisce about vintage music and old relatives and find time for a trip to the pub

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: The friends head to the tidal outcrop of Burgh Island on the south coast of Devon to fish for wrasse, and Bob kickstarts their trip with a huge surprise for Paul. Keen to test the surrounding waters, Paul walks down to the beach, but is met with an unexpected but familiar face, while he also encounters a rather unconventional fishing approach. Will he be tempted to stray from his tried and tested methods?

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.sub-title: Not Going Out Christmas Special: Driving Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitable way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star

programme.desc: Kevin Bridges hosts an extended episode of the satirical quiz, with regular team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton joined by journalist Helen Lewis and comedian Chloe Petts

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Mel and Lou are joined by Ross Kemp, Shirley Ballas and Rosie Jones as Shirley divulges her revenge on a cheating husband and Ross spills all on a prison-based prank

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Mel and Lou Sanders are joined by Daisy May Cooper, Ardal O'Hanlon and Emmanuel Sonubi as Emmanuel explains why his towels are sticky and Daisy gets creative

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: When a man who arranged to meet Lovejoy at the local cricket game dies suddenly, it falls to the antiques dealer to find the fortune that was promised to the widow. The unusual legacy includes a forged snuff box. Ian McShane stars

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Trapped and desperate, Bergerac must negotiate for his life while still drawing together the threads of the mystery. Meanwhile, Nigel has a surprise for Charlie

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Webb's impartiality is compromised when he falls for an assault victim's beautiful wife. Chris Simmons and Shaun Scott star

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Nick's funeral is an unexpectedly glamorous occasion, while Eva has Ronnie sacked from the undercover operation in the hope of gaining Jack's trust. A star of Eighties cult TV injures himself while preparing for a comeback, but Mike discovers all is not as it seems. Sylvester McCoy guest stars

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: With replacements for Joe and Nick still missing, Julia begins organising interviews and is swept off her feet by Heston Carter, a charming former surgeon hoping to enter general practice. Meanwhile, Ronnie tries to inform Eva that Jimmi is aware she is undercover. Owen Brenman stars

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: An emergency meeting is called to decide what should be done about Connie, but she schemes to manipulate things in her favour, ensuring nobody is there to speak out against her and getting Michael to influence the other board members. Mickie's grief clouds her judgement, and Chrissie feels rejected by her father. Sean is overjoyed when Jess accepts his proposal

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Chloe is in a critical condition after her beating from a dealer. Linda blames Jordan for closing the drugs programme and resorts to desperate measures when Annie's grief and withdrawal symptoms threaten to overwhelm her. Meanwhile, Omar and Jeff learn the importance of teamwork. Starring Christine Tremarco

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Webb's impartiality is compromised when he falls for an assault victim's beautiful wife. Chris Simmons and Shaun Scott star

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: The club is back in business, but will Peggy scupper Ronnie's happiness when she hears Glenda's secret? Meanwhile, Whitney and Bianca take a miserable Carol out

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Shirley learns that Phil is on drugs, and is determined to help. Glenda tries to reason with Ronnie, and Heather is left out in the cold

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Professor Wild in the Library with the Revolver
programme.desc: Harry, Lola and Fergus are the guests of honour at a weekend-long 1920s themed murder mystery party at a hotel on a secluded island. But as a ferry arrives to take them to the island, over at the hotel the head chef is bludgeoned to death in his own kitchen

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: The death of a local farmer leads Blake into Ballarat's murky world of late-night, back-street gambling and two brothers with contrasting fortunes

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lady Jane teams up with an entrepreneur named Palmer to convert a warehouse into an Art Nouveau antiques centre. However, Lovejoy suspects he is a conman, so muscles in as an adviser on the project. Ian McShane and Phyllis Logan star

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A mystery pension payment leads Sharon, Tracey and Dorien on a voyage of discovery. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard starts a panic in the neighbourhood when he discovers an outbreak of a lesser-known household pest. Long-running comedy set in Yorkshire, with Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo spots a sinister looking motorcyclist, and after recovering from the fright eventually concludes it could be one of his old girlfriends. Long-running comedy, starring Bill Owen

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Alcohol threatens to prevent Yorkshire's first trainee astronaut from doing his job, so Foggy prepares to step into his boots. Brian Wilde stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Tensions rise to deadly levels when a performance troupe of anarchists arrive in Kembleford, leaving Mrs McCarthy unimpressed and Bunty inspired

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Catherine and Shaf call in at Far Sunderland Farm to visit Alison and Daryl, but discover a scene of carnage when they enter the building, with a blood-soaked Alison slumped on the dining table having taken an overdose. Meanwhile, Andy and Jodie begin to suspect that the person who killed Vicky Fleming could be someone on the team and as the investigation heads towards a conclusion, John's torment increases, leading him to take drastic measures to avoid the consequences of his actions

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates the killing of a zookeeper, thought to have been mauled to death by a tiger in 2006, when blood found in the victim's lodgings suggests he was murdered before his body was placed in the big-cat enclosure. However, not all the team members are happy about the new case as Brian's animal rights tendencies come to the fore, bringing him into conflict with the zoo's PR. Alun Armstrong and Amanda Redman star

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The coppers search for the killer of docusoap star Efrona Davis, whose body has been found washed ashore. It soon emerges that she received a knock to the head before entering the water, and the list of suspects includes her father, Wayland Bay's resident comedian Rowan Priestley and Gavin Oldham, a man she arranged a date with on the night she died. The investigation takes a surprising turn when a second body is found on the beach. Ricky Tomlinson and John McArdle guest star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lady Jane teams up with an entrepreneur named Palmer to convert a warehouse into an Art Nouveau antiques centre. However, Lovejoy suspects he is a conman, so muscles in as an adviser on the project. Ian McShane and Phyllis Logan star

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: You Are Cordially Invited to an Assassination: Part 1
programme.desc: Harry encounters her most dangerous adversary yet. Crime drama, starring Jane Seymour

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: Lyle helps horse trainer Herb Griffiths lease a field for his prize racer Market Mischief, but finds his loyalties tested when travellers take up residence there and are then accused of stealing the racehorse. Peter has been instructed by his client Mrs Collins to file for divorce from her cross-dressing husband, but the optimistic solicitor believes a reconciliation is possible with his intervention. Hill returns to seek payment on Simon's debt. Robert Bathurst guests

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien's passion for mind control causes problems, Tracey finds a new pet spider, and Sharon has tooth trouble while eating peanuts

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey's son Garth falls in love with Dorien's visiting niece Rosa, but things go wrong when a furious Dorien decides to meddle in their relationship

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A mystery pension payment leads Sharon, Tracey and Dorien on a voyage of discovery. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The dodgy dealer agrees to help Charlotte's friend Mary Gladden save a nursing home by valuing and selling its antiques - only to find himself in the line of fire as someone makes an attempt on his life. Drama, starring Ian McShane, Dudley Sutton, Caroline Langrishe and Susan Fleetwood

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lovejoy finds an unusual Ming Dynasty war cannon being used as a plant pot. His client asks him to get the best price for the item - but the Chinese community objects to any such proposed deal in no uncertain terms and when Charlotte takes the dodgy dealer to London to sell it they are abducted. Burt Kwouk guest stars, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: When faced with a hefty dentist bill, Lovejoy agrees to settle it by investigating the alleged death by drowning of Terence Sullivan, a fellow antiques dealer. It doesn't take long to determine that Sullivan is still alive, having taken up residence with an attractive stewardess. When Charlotte sees Lovejoy's caring side towards the 'widow', she feels she may have misjudged his character and finally gives in to his seductive charm. Pete Postlethwaite guest stars, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Tensions rise to deadly levels when a performance troupe of anarchists arrive in Kembleford, leaving Mrs McCarthy unimpressed and Bunty inspired

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra and the team unearth the 10-year-old case of a poet from Belfast whose burnt body was found in the scrapyard of a known gangster. Gerry becomes convinced the victim's links with the criminal fraternity led to his demise, but Brian has a different theory, believing the secret of his murder lies in his verse. Amanda Redman, Dennis Waterman and Alun Armstrong star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of an East German immigrant, but all they have to go on are his mysterious final words, which translate as 'blue flower'. As they piece together his remarkable story, Sandra tries to gain the trust of his estranged daughter. Crime drama, starring Amanda Redman

programme.title: Miss Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. A man arrives in an East Anglian village with his sister Joanna to convalesce following a flying accident - but the residents' warm welcome isn't all it seems. Joan Hickson stars as the elderly sleuth, with Andrew Bicknell and Sabina Franklyn

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When popular local radio host Ryan Osbourne is killed in an explosion at his old high school, the shockwaves rattle the community as a fundraising initiative ends in tragedy. The hidden rivalries and secrets that emerge create a long list of suspects for Shepherd. Drama, starring Neill Rea

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: Spade searches for answers regarding the mysterious young boy everyone seems to be looking for. Samir takes him into hiding, but no one knows what to make of his incessant writing

programme.title: The Last Detective
programme.desc: Excessive flushing sounds convince an elderly woman that her neighbour has killed his wife and is disposing of her body parts via the toilet. Naturally, Davies is sent to investigate, and it isn't long before the detective has gained a broken nose and an obsessive stalker. Meanwhile, Mod lands a job in the mobile catering industry. Anna Wing (once of EastEnders) guest stars in the detective drama, with Peter Davison and Sean Hughes

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra and the team unearth the 10-year-old case of a poet from Belfast whose burnt body was found in the scrapyard of a known gangster. Gerry becomes convinced the victim's links with the criminal fraternity led to his demise, but Brian has a different theory, believing the secret of his murder lies in his verse. Amanda Redman, Dennis Waterman and Alun Armstrong star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Mother Mildred returns to Nonnatus while Nurse Crane is in hospital receiving treatment for her back. With help from Trixie, she provides care for a retired dock worker whose former job has taken its toll on his health, only to discover his son may be suffering from a more severe condition. However, her insensitive manner angers the family and they refuse to let her help them

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Great Slaughter's twinning with a German town is met with animosity by some members of the twinning committee and townsfolk. Karl Fischer, the German mayor, with his wife Elsa and a group of German soldiers led by General Udo Von Stark arrive for the ceremony. An attempt on Fischer's life kills Ellis Everett, who was opposed to the twinning. Sister Boniface investigates whether it's an accident or a malicious plan and soon discovers a handkerchief soaked with sweat and smelling of acetone. Mystery drama, starring Lorna Watson

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: A writers retreat on a picturesque estate generates ample inspiration when the mentor Dame Audrey McKinnon is found floating under a nearby waterfall

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Kirsten O'Brien takes a 15-mile walk along the River Tee, exploring the history of Upper Teesdale, meeting some of extraordinary people who call its banks home and taking a wild swim in its white waters. She begins her trek at South Gare near Redcar - a childhood playground for Kirsten and her brother - and then takes in High Force, Middleton and ancient Egglestone Abbey

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon explores the eastern Mediterranean, beginning in Cyprus, where he goes on patrol with UN peacekeepers overseeing an abandoned buffer zone. He moves on to Lebanon, where he discovers the roots of Christianity, and Israel, where he boards a navy vessel guarding the country's offshore oil reserves. Finally, he crosses the world's most heavily fortified borders into Gaza, where he meets a woman helping reconstruction efforts by making bricks into ash

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Libya, visiting areas of the country devastated by recent fighting as well as one of the world's best preserved ancient Roman cities. He moves on to Tunisia, where he discovers a mountain fortress and meets a man keeping ancient Berber traditions alive, including making olive oil with the help of camels. Finally, he crosses the sea to Sicily, and discovers how the Mafia are attempting to take advantage of declining population numbers

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn
programme.desc: Simon Reeve uncovers extraordinary stories and experiences the diverse collection of cultures located in the southern tropics. The first leg of his journey sees the globe-trotting presenter cross the sweeping vistas of Namibia and Botswana, where he witnesses the vestiges of German colonisation in Swakopmund and searches for the Bushmen of the Kalahari desert

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: In 1930, recovering from a personal crisis, Agatha Christie fell in love with and married Max Mallowan. This relationship, and the security it brought, saw Agatha enter the most prolific and successful chapter of her career. This would be the period in which Agatha penned some of her most famous and enduring bestsellers, including Murder on the Orient Express. Lucy follows in Agatha's footsteps to discover the roots of these works and explores how, in later life, Agatha achieved global celebrity - but remained very much the anonymous observer, hiding in plain sight

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville creates a special blend of snuff, but will his customers notice any beneficial effects? The ladies get dressed up for line-dancing, while Gastric is prompted to go on a diet. A furtive Mr Newbold thinks he's found a pastime to share with Mrs Rossi - away from the prying eyes of Mrs Featherstone. However, a determined Black Widow enlists assistance from Granville and Leroy for a crash-course in how to ride a bicycle. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright expands his empire by opening a mobile shop in a bid to impress Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, but the enterprise is cut short by a close encounter with some perishables

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Gastric spends the night at Madge's house, but has he found the path to her best bedroom? Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain, not knowing exactly what is in the very large crate. Eric and Cyril have a fall out over a lost compass, while Mr Newbold falls in and gets a soaking on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi. The canny grocer has his work cut out getting friends to make up and getting a wet customer home without being spotted by 'Black Widow' Mrs Featherstone. Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Joe Maplin announces Gladys and Spike's engagement to the local papers - much to their annoyance - but all is not as it seems. Comedy, starring Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom decides he cannot cope living with his father after they argue over domestic issues. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: Black Ops
programme.desc: Police community support officers Dom and Kay are tasked to infiltrate a predominantly black gang of villains. Working undercover, the pair are unwittingly thrust into the murky world of deep cover infiltration as they pose as disgruntled former officers within a powerful criminal enterprise, with the motiviations of the DI who sent them in becoming increasingly unclear. Comedy, starring Gbemisola Ikumelo and Hammed Animashaun

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank looks back on his glory days in the 1980s and reflects on his choices. As the facts about the robbery become clearer, Haines and Selforth find an eager new partner in Diane. Shanthi and Jerzy turn against Rani, inadvertently offering an opportunity to the local drug boss. Greg must go above and beyond the call of duty to help his new friends out - whether he wants to or not

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice and Hugo's baby is christened. The godparents are chosen, the Bishop of Mulberry officiates, and David asks Geraldine to marry him. She consents to his proposal - until sense prevails. Comedy, guest starring Sean Bean, with Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A summer water shortage presents problems for the locals, especially Alice, whose lack of clean clothes forces her to wear a Wonder Woman outfit instead. Eric and Cyril have a fall out over a lost compass, while Mr Newbold falls in and gets a soaking on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi. The canny grocer has his work cut out getting friends to make up and getting a wet customer home without being spotted by 'Black Widow' Mrs Featherstone. Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness

However, a determined Black Widow enlists assistance from Granville and Leroy for a crash-course in how to ride a bicycle. programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright expands his empire by opening a mobile shop in a bid to impress Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, but the enterprise is cut short by a close encounter with some perishables

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee imagines having the perfect life with Lucy, but the reality may not be good enough to match up to his dreams. Comedy, guest starring Bobby Ball, with Lee Mack, Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: First episode of the sitcom about a drifter whose friendship with his flatmate is complicated by the fact her ex-boyfriend is his best mate. programme.desc: Agnes is disappointed to discover she is not invited to Maria's hen party because of her age, and decides to gatecrash the event, only to end up at the wrong venue. programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.desc: Geraldine's hopes of romance are fuelled by a visit from David's handsome brother, while the Hortons return from honeymoon with a souvenir they had not bargained for - Alice is pregnant. The only problem is, she doesn't know it yet. Clerical comedy, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers. From Christmas Eve 1999

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice suggests an unconventional nativity play starring herself and Hugo as Mary and Joseph, and adds an extra touch of authenticity by going into labour mid-performance. The coincidence is so striking that she asks Geraldine whether she has given birth to the Son of God - even though her baby is a girl. Festive episode from 1999, starring Dawn French and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Alice and Hugo's baby is christened. The godparents are chosen, the Bishop of Mulberry officiates, and David asks Geraldine to marry him. She consents to his proposal - until sense prevails. Comedy, guest starring Sean Bean, with Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A summer water shortage presents problems for the locals, especially Alice, whose lack of clean clothes forces her to wear a Wonder Woman outfit instead. The parched residents soon see events turned on their head as the water company offers to resolve the problem by flooding the village to create a reservoir

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: A squeak on Granville's bike interferes with his hopes of romance, and Arkwright worries about a mysterious visitor to a house in Atkinson Terrace

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright is reluctant to buy a new suit until Nurse Gladys Emmanuel persuades him to. He agrees, but only if I can be made in the same style as his old one. Roy Clarke's classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker, David Jason and Lynda Baron

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville encourages Gastric to become a fearless hunter in an effort to impress Madge and get closer to her. Mavis senses Mrs Featherstone, aka the Black Widow, making a move on Granville and decides to stand up for herself for once. Mr Newbold goes to the library in the hope of meeting up with Mrs Rossi, while Eric and Cyril finally get their wives to go camping - but who is going to help with the washing-up? David Jason, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.title: Alma's Not Normal
programme.desc: When Alma discovers that her care-leaving background can help secure her an audition to join a theatre company for a national tour, she jumps at the chance. However, when social services sends through her records, Alma comes face to face with the stark reality of her childhood growing up in and out of the care system. Could this bombshell lead to Alma missing out on an opportunity she's been waiting her whole life for? Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux B&B. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the pair make the most of their weekend away. Thomas is perplexed yet secretly thrilled by the sudden attention from the Plaguers, who, after admiring Alison's discarded portrait of him are now affording him celebrity status in Button House, hanging on to his every word. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Alma's Not Normal
programme.desc: Things are not going well between Lin and Joan and the news that Alma will be leaving for a six-month tour looks like it might push Lin over the edge. When the social worker visits, Lin snaps and disappears, leaving Alma fearing that her mum may have turned back to her old ways

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mary walks Julian through her journey of self-discovery and how she finally found her voice. Thomas realises enough is enough - he must go 'cold turkey' on his Alison addiction and needs Pat's undivided attention. Old friends of Mike check in to the guesthouse and agree to share the surprising secret of their success. The Captain is thrown by a change to his daily routine, so Kitty steps in to teach him how to live in the moment. Robin helps Lady Button to remember lost friends

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary looks for a new flatmate following Dermot's departure, and along comes Tony - but he may not be the perfect choice he appears to be. Meanwhile, Anthea's requests for a pay rise are greeted with banishment to the stationery cupboard

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Fortune smiles on Mike and Alison when a TV company comes calling, looking for an old house in which to film a period drama. But to get the money in the bank, Alison must ensure the shoot goes without a hitch despite the horde of curious ghosts, the house's crumbling floorboards and her crippling crush on the show's lead actor. Meanwhile, Thomas and Lady Button learn the meaning of a free pass, and Julian tries his luck at betting on horse racing. Comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Learning that their posh neighbours the Beg-Chetwyndes have an ancient claim over their land, Mike and Alison throw an upmarket dinner party to help resolve a thorny issue. But with the ghosts her only guide to high-class decorum, the evening starts badly and only gets worse - thanks to Mary's woeful catering, Mike's clueless deal-making and Robin's raucous celebration of the lunar eclipse. Elsewhere, the spooks become obsessed with a TV sitcom. Comedy, guest starring Geoff McGivern and Sophie Thompson

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Broadcaster and journalist Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of America's most notorious female murderers, in a quest to discover what drives a woman to kill. He travels to Lowell Correctional Institute in Florida to talk to Rebecca Fenton, convicted for the murder of her husband Larry, who was shot dead in their home. He also looks into the details of the case, learning how for several years it seemed she was going to get away with the crime, until the involvement of the FBI helped bring her to justice

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: In the wake of a violent storm, a Rhode Island harbourmaster finds a badly decomposed body aboard a sailboat

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.sub-title: The Death Cleaners vs the Sister Council
programme.desc: A couple who have raised eight children are ready to embrace the death cleaning process, but the children are against the move

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: V and Ollie blue light to a rugby pitch to help a man who had a seizure. Plus, Stef and Lee treat an excitable 6-year-old Spider-Man fighting an asthma attack

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Homes
programme.desc: The Scott brothers renovate a home for newlyweds A'amna and Ibrahim

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets 47-year-old Stuart in Torquay, who has progressive multiple sclerosis. Despite being six foot seven, he sleeps in a chair in the living room. His primary carer is his 73-year-old mother, Grandma Lin, who is completely blind, and walks across town every day to see to her son and her granddaughter Lauren's needs. Can the crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians help turn their lives around?

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Plymouth to meet the Morfey family, who sold their multi-level home and bought an old wrought-iron forge with the intention of renovating it for their two eldest sons, who have cerebral palsy. But when their daughter got leukaemia and moved miles away for treatment, supported by mum Tara, the family was torn apart. Now the house remains half-built, with no kitchen, hot water or living space. What the Morfeys need is a little help to bring the family back together

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible. The family have decided that Karis should move in with her older sister Jo, but her entire home is inaccessible for Karis, so the team decides to build a large two-storey extension to make the house more suitable. Elsewhere, Billy takes on jousting at Warwick Castle

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats a seven-month-old fox red Labrador puppy with lameness, caused by a joint defect called osteochondritis dissecans. He explains that medicine can be given, but in the end the dog may end up requiring a complete ankle replacement or a joint fusion on both sides. Jo has travelled 400 miles to bring her beloved four-year-old springer spaniel to see Noel. The pooch's kneecap keeps slipping in and out of her knee joint, and despite several previous procedures, the problems persist. After an examination by Noel, Jo faces the further worry of osteoarthritis

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Spaniel Scrumpy is suffering from lameness and Noel discovers he has a collapsed disc and severe elbow arthritis. He already has a chequered medical history totalling six previous operations to his elbows, hip and knee. Meanwhile, there is an emergency admission when a 15-month-old dachshund arrives with a mystery brain condition, and Noel and his neurology colleagues have their work cut out to identify the cause. When his condition rapidly deteriorates overnight, suddenly the life of this much-loved young dog hangs in the balance

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets 47-year-old Stuart in Torquay, who has progressive multiple sclerosis. Despite being six foot seven, he sleeps in a chair in the living room. programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete travels to Northern Ireland to pick up three stray dogs and bring them back to Essex. He also meets a Shar Pei who is in constant pain and may need surgery

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildon's Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets Lurcher Terri, who's terrified of the world and must learn to trust again, and helps settle a family of chihuahuas given up by their heartbroken owner

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: More comedy sketches, including Nan visiting a pound shop, and Lauren discovering she has not been invited to a party

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: A luxury hotel chain makes penniless and exhausted couple Mike and Alison an offer they can't refuse, but the prospect of their departure drives a wedge between the ghosts, and the hardline Captain finds himself ostracised, while Pat is voted in as reluctant leader. As the clueless spirits brainstorm money-making schemes, the Captain takes matters into his own hands. Meanwhile, fortune smiles on Headless Humphrey in his ceaseless search for his errant body

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: After seasickness and choppy waters cause a wife to fall from her husband's fishing vessel, the race is on to save her. However, a deep dive reveals a shocking truth

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: Doug's fiancee won't move in until he clears his tiki collection and his dead ex-wife's things, so the Death Cleaners help him sort out the clutter in his heart and home

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Darren treat a woman suffering from terminal cancer. Laura and Kerry are called to attend a young man with a painful abscess in his throat

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Key witness Fran Morris (Kelly Harrison) is left with serious head injuries following an attack, and her 12-year-old son goes missing at the same time. Max suspects the drug dealer she helped to catch is behind the assault, but when the boy is finally found he remains tight-lipped and fails to confirm the story. As the case stalls, it is left to forensics to unravel what really happened

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A distressed 17-year-old is found traumatised by years of prolonged abuse and Stevie struggles to establish his identity after the lad's sister fails to recognise him. Max re-examines the evidence from the disappearance of a 12-year-old boy five years previously, hoping to make a connection with someone called Gareth, but it soon becomes clear the troubled young man at the station is not telling the whole story

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old is abducted from outside his school, Terry is appointed Family Liaison Officer and finds himself keeping the peace between the boy's divorcing parents. CCTV footage reveals the child got into a car with a man after taking a phone call, and the race is on to discover the identities of the mystery caller and the driver. Emma Cunniffe guest stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Leon's prison officer friend is reluctantly caught up in a plot to smuggle a telephone into Longmarsh jail for a drug dealer. The constable persuades her to go ahead with the plan - despite the risks to herself and her young son - and deliver a bugged phone so CID can continue their surveillance of the gangster. It soon becomes clear the villain has murder in mind. Gemma Atkinson guest stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A frantic mother reports her car has been stolen with her baby still strapped inside. The suspect is soon traced, but the child is not recovered until later when her father, following an alleged tip-off, traces her to an alleyway where she is found distressed and badly bruised, still strapped in her car seat. Leon is not convinced the injuries are a result of her recent adventure, and suspects the infant has been abused

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Smithy holds a public meeting, hoping to gain the trust and cooperation of hostile residents on the Manley Road estate, who are being terrorised by drug dealers. A plucky shopkeeper takes matters into her own hands to halt the reign of fear, only to find her daughter suffers a backlash from the gang. At the end of a tiring day, Tony Stamp stuns the inspector with unexpected news

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Leon responds to a call from a distraught mother whose 18-month-old child has sustained serious head injuries. She claims the toddler fell from her highchair, but suspicion mounts that the mother's partner may have contravened his restraining order to visit the family. Tony Stamp spends his last shift with Sun Hill comforting the woman, and is shocked when he has to arrest her for harming her own daughter

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A hitman linked to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water

programme.title: Ghosts

Elsewhere, the spooks become obsessed with a TV sitcom. Comedy, guest starring Geoff McGivern and Sophie Thompson

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: A luxury hotel chain makes penniless and exhausted couple Mike and Alison an offer they can't refuse, but the prospect of their departure drives a wedge between the ghosts, and the hardline Captain finds himself ostracised, while Pat is voted in as reluctant leader. programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Homes
programme.desc: The Scott brothers renovate a home for newlyweds A'amna and Ibrahim

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets 47-year-old Stuart in Torquay, who has progressive multiple sclerosis. Despite being six foot seven, he sleeps in a chair in the living room. His primary carer is his 73-year-old mother, Grandma Lin, who is completely blind, and walks across town every day to see to her son and her granddaughter Lauren's needs. Can the crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians help turn their lives around?

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to Plymouth to meet the Morfey family, who sold their multi-level home and bought an old wrought-iron forge with the intention of renovating it for their two eldest sons, who have cerebral palsy. But when their daughter got leukaemia and moved miles away for treatment, supported by mum Tara, the family was torn apart. Now the house remains half-built, with no kitchen, hot water or living space. What the Morfeys need is a little help to bring the family back together

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: This time, Nick Knowles and the team transforms a home in Bromsgrove. Karis, a 28-year-old woman who has cerebral palsy, currently lives with her mother, Karen, but now her own health is deteriorating and it is making caring for Karis almost impossible. The family have decided that Karis should move in with her older sister Jo, but her entire home is inaccessible for Karis, so the team decides to build a large two-storey extension to make the house more suitable. Elsewhere, Billy takes on jousting at Warwick Castle

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats a seven-month-old fox red Labrador puppy with lameness, caused by a joint defect called osteochondritis dissecans. He explains that medicine can be given, but in the end the dog may end up requiring a complete ankle replacement or a joint fusion on both sides. Jo has travelled 400 miles to bring her beloved four-year-old springer spaniel to see Noel. The pooch's kneecap keeps slipping in and out of her knee joint, and despite several previous procedures, the problems persist. After an examination by Noel, Jo faces the further worry of osteoarthritis

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Spaniel Scrumpy is suffering from lameness and Noel discovers he has a collapsed disc and severe elbow arthritis. He already has a chequered medical history totalling six previous operations to his elbows, hip and knee. Meanwhile, there is an emergency admission when a 15-month-old dachshund arrives with a mystery brain condition, and Noel and his neurology colleagues have their work cut out to identify the cause. When his condition rapidly deteriorates overnight, suddenly the life of this much-loved young dog hangs in the balance

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Big Irv has had a life-long love affair with VWs, so he's extremely surprised when he's offered the chance to work on a very early 1949 Beetle

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit landed gent Sir Benjamin Slade as they search for more upcycling prospects. Simon converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry refurbishes a club fender fire surround and turns a quick profit on a Fordson tractor

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea gives jeweller Annelies and woodturner Lucinda the opportunity to turn their hobbies and skills into money-making businesses. After investing £7,000 into setting up her jewellery business, Annelies from Glasgow needs help on bringing that money back and making a profit. Lucinda spends what little free time she has in her garage turning wood into make-up brushes. Mentors Barnaby and Dru see huge potential in her but will her first market be a success?

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Glassblower Alison from Buckinghamshire and upcycling couple Fernando and Saurabh from Berkshire visit Dom Chinea's life-changing training camp. Alison aspires to sell her pieces in high-end galleries, but mentor Allister knows standards are high and getting her work into them won't be easy. He focuses on the details of Alison's pieces and pushes her hard to improve them. Fernando and Saurabh want to turn their upcycling hobby into a full-time business. Mentor Joel gives them tough feedback about concentrating on every aspect of their work and the importance of a good website

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A delightful collection of British classics comes up for auction, including an Austin A35 and a Hillman Avenger Estate in stunning condition. An E-Type Jaguar also hits the auction

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The final episode examines the liberation of Auschwitz and other camps by the Soviet Red Army. However, freedom did not mean an end to the prisoners' suffering - many were mistreated by their liberators and thousands died for the want of medical treatment

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. Germany was losing the war but Hitler refused to surrender, instead pursuing a policy of Total War, which played out as a psychological drama within his inner circle

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Lincoln Cathedral, where objects brought to be valued include a set of surgeon's tools from the 1860s and a plate that has spent years hidden in a cupboard. Plus, a man who is trying to recover his grandfather's paintings explains his quest

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team revisits Lincoln Cathedral, where items examined include a Georgian dining table, a Chinese picture bought for very little, and a collection of early TV implements used to screen the Queen's coronation

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming gets stuck in the mud in Woodseaves Cutting, and explores the charming canal-side village of Kinver in Staffordshire. First broadcast 9 December 2020

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming navigates the River Severn, and takes an unexpected bath as he tumbles at the Tardebigge lock flight in Worcestershire. First broadcast 9 December 2020

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch tries to ensure that Godber has not blown his chances of early release after he gets into a fight a week before his parole board hearing. Final episode of the classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Robert Lindsay stars in the first episode of John Sullivan's 1970s comedy about Wolfie Smith, a suburban revolutionary who dreams of becoming the next Che Guevara as leader of the Tooting Popular Front. Cheryl Hall, Peter Vaughan and Mike Grady co-star

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie has to put his political opinions to one side as he prepares to meet his girlfriend's parents

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A series of head-turning supercharged cars head to the Mathewson's auction room. Plus, going under Derek's hammer - a Ford Escort XR3 and a beautiful MGA

programme.title: Bangers & Cash

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv restores a 1970s Lamborghini Espada for a client in the Middle East. Hidden structural damage and spiralling engine issues threaten the entire project

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley

Lucinda spends what little free time she has in her garage turning wood into make-up brushes. Mentors Barnaby and Dru see huge potential in her but will her first market be a success?

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Glassblower Alison from Buckinghamshire and upcycling couple Fernando and Saurabh from Berkshire visit Dom Chinea's life-changing training camp. He focuses on the details of Alison's pieces and pushes her hard to improve them. Fernando and Saurabh want to turn their upcycling hobby into a full-time business. programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Church minister John Humberstone has been welcoming guests to the Grade-II listed Alexandra Hotel in Llandudno for the past couple of years, but the business is in deep trouble. Alex Polizzi heads to north Wales to try to revive the establishment's fortunes, but has her work cut out to transform its failing restaurant, bad reputation and negative reviews

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: The race to build the world's next generation of engineering wonders - structures and machines that are more ambitious and more advanced than anything seen before

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Adam is quick to question Dr Weatherill's competence when a beach outing ends tragically for a family. Dr Ormerod leaps in to defend her - but ends up revealing his colleague's condition in his haste. Meanwhile, Dr Goodwin struggles to help a pair of teenage parents gain access to their baby. Amy Robbins and Robert Daws star

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Mr Rose and Dr Ormerod attempt to rescue a drowning boy during a trip to a hippie commune. Catherine is asked on a date by a local fisherman, while Dr Goodwin discovers the parents of a sick baby are not all they seem after he diagnoses the infant's illness. Robert Daws, Denis Lill, Amelia Curtis and Paul Fox star

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Ruth Watson advises Keith and Val Morris on ways to revamp their failing hotel and conference centre the Hanmer Arms, which is losing money despite being large and well-equipped. She explains why the lack of a full-time receptionist and permanent head chef mean problems with continuity - and urges the reluctant and negative owners to boost their dwindling bookings by attracting corporate clients

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder follows the investigation into the suspicious death of 30-year-old Lyndsey Vaux, whose body was found in the Wigan home she shared with her partner Becky Reid and Becky's mum Gillian. Neighbours told police that the victim suffered regular abuse and beatings at the hands of her girlfriend. But when the pathology report proved inconclusive, police needed to find proof that she was responsible

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Joy's dream sends the three Merriwicks on a search for Phillip Harper, Joy's father. Fantasy drama, starring Catherine Bell

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits South America in search of a predator believed to be more fearsome than a piranha. Tipped off about an attack on a diver by a single fish, he knows there is a real monster to find, but lightning storms threaten his journey as he heads deeper into the remote jungles of Suriname

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul tries to train an overly eager German Shepherd puppy that does not know how or when to calm down. He also works to gain the trust of a terrified West Highland terrier too scared to even set foot on the soil outside, and works with Battersea staff to encourage the petrified dog to come out of its shell

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: In the presenter's final series from Battersea Dogs and Cats Home, Paul falls head over heels with a Newfoundland that needs major life-changing surgery on its back legs. He also meets a labrador cross that is obsessed with water and keeps flooding its kennel and helps a terrified bichon frise that was found wandering around a forest

programme.title: What Would Your Kid Do?
programme.desc: Jason Manford presents the show which asks how well people really know their kids, by challenging parents to guess what their children will do in a variety of entertaining situations. programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Captain Glenn finally wakes up to some good news - his first mate is finally joining the crew, helping to relieve some stress before the anticipated sea trial

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: The Beckham Feud: Truth and Lies

Journalists who have tracked the family for decades investigate the ways in which fame, loyalty and public scrutiny have strained a once carefully managed family brand

programme.title: My Hoarder Mum and Me
programme.desc: A Place in the Sun presenter Jasmine Harman embarks on a personal journey to help her mother Vasoulla overcome her extreme hoarding habit. Over the course of 30 years, the family's five-bedroom London home has become filled from floor to ceiling with clutter, forcing Jasmine's 12-year-old brother Cameron to move out. Debate still rages over whether hoarding should be classified as a mental illness, and Jasmine meets the families of other sufferers to learn how they deal with the problem. Narrated by Rupert Houseman

programme.title: Out There
programme.desc: With Crowther aware that Nathan has pressured the witness, the farmer must now strategise as to how he will impede Crowther's investigation, get rid of Kenny's body, collect Turuk's drug consignment and bring it to the new warehouse on the farm. Drama, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: A Mother's Son
programme.desc: First of a two-part drama, starring Hermione Norris, Martin Clunes, Paul McGann and Alexander Arnold. The murder of a schoolgirl rocks the residents of a quiet coastal town in Suffolk, and when Rosie stumbles upon a pair of bloodstained trainers hidden in her home, she suspects someone in her family may have been involved in the killing. With her son Jamie and stepson Rob both acting suspiciously, could she be right?
